spells.effectSummary: You tear the veil to the afterlife and call a spirit from its final resting place.

spells.name: Call The Blood
spells.effectSummary: With a word and gesture, you cause streams of blood to erupt from the target's mouth, nostrils, ears, or other facial openings and come rushing into your mouth.

spells.name: Call the Ten
spells.effectSummary: The Ten Magic Warriors were the first of the Magaambya's students, and they come to your aid even now.

spells.name: Call to Arms
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You are about to roll for initiative.

spells.name: Calm
spells.effectSummary: You forcibly calm creatures in the area, soothing them into a nonviolent state; each creature must attempt a Will save.

spells.name: Camel Spit
spells.effectSummary: You alter your stomach, esophagus, and tongue to be able to spit partially digested food with force.

spells.name: Canopy Crawler
spells.effectSummary: The target grows a prehensile tail, or gains prehensile qualities in their existing tail, to help them climb with ease.

spells.name: Canticle of Everlasting Grief
spells.effectSummary: You create a melody distilled from pure grief, conveying the inevitable loss of everything your target cherishes, audible to only them.

spells.name: Capital Dividend
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

spells.name: Captivating Adoration
spells.effectSummary: You become intensely entrancing, and creatures are distracted by you as long as they remain within the area.

spells.name: Carrion Mire
spells.effectSummary: The ground opens into a seemingly endless mass of corpse limbs, grasping at all creatures within the area to drag them down.

spells.name: Carryall
spells.effectSummary: A small platform of magical force materializes adjacent to you to carry cargo.

spells.name: Cascade Countermeasure
spells.duration: until the Arcane Cascade stance ends
spells.effectSummary: You quickly adjust your Arcane Cascade to offer magical protection.

spells.name: Cast into Time
spells.effectSummary: You release a wave of temporal energy that sends creatures violently tumbling through time, scarring their thoughts with the information flowing around them.

spells.name: Caster's Imposition
spells.effectSummary: A magical interference prevents the target from contributing to any form of cooperative spellcasting.

spells.name: Cataclysm
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the unimaginable power of world-ending cataclysms, ripping a small piece of each cataclysm and combining them together into one horrifically powerful attack.

base.damage: 3d10 acid + 3d10 bludgeoning + 3d10 cold + 3d10 electricity + 3d10 bludgeoning + 3d10 fire

spells.name: Catch Your Name
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature on your plane speaks your private or true name

spells.name: Caustic Blast
spells.effectSummary: You fling a large glob of acid that immediately detonates, spraying nearby creatures.

spells.name: Cauterize Wounds
spells.effectSummary: You seal bleeding wounds with fire.

spells.name: Cave Fangs
spells.effectSummary: Sharp flowstone formations protrude from the ground and ceiling, dealing 6d6 piercing damage to creatures in the area with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Celestial Accord
spells.targets: 2 creatures that each have an unfriendly or worse attitude toward the other
spells.effectSummary: You intervene in a heated disagreement between two creatures, encouraging them to put aside their differences and find some common ground.

spells.name: Celestial Brand
spells.effectSummary: A blazing symbol appears on the target, cursing it to face divine justice.

spells.name: Censure Falsehoods
spells.effectSummary: You call on your patron to reprimand a creature that has attempted a Deception or Stealth check against you or an ally within the past month.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.targets: 1 creature, plus any number of additional creatures
spells.effectSummary: You discharge a powerful bolt of lightning at the target, dealing 8d12 electricity damage.

spells.name: Chameleon Coat
spells.effectSummary: You shift the colors of the targets' outermost layer of clothing and gear to be closer to their environment when they remain still.

spells.name: Champion's Sacrifice
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally is hit by a Strike, or an ally fails a saving throw against an effect that doesn't affect you.

spells.name: Channel Arrogance
spells.effectSummary: You channel your heightened sense of self-worth into a creature, forcing them to acknowledge your true worth.

spells.name: Charged Javelin
spells.effectSummary: You fire a javelin of electricity that leaves a charged field around its target.

spells.name: Charitable Urge
spells.effectSummary: You speak on the virtue of charity, compelling the target to give away its possessions.

spells.name: Charm
spells.effectSummary: To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze.

spells.name: Charming Push
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You push at the target's mind to deflect their ire.

spells.name: Charming Touch
spells.targets: 1 creature that could find you attractive
spells.effectSummary: You infuse your target with attraction, causing it to act friendlier toward you.

spells.name: Chastising Retort
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within range attempts a Deception check to Lie or Feint.

spells.name: Chilling Darkness
spells.effectSummary: You shoot an utterly cold ray of darkness tinged with unholy energy.

spells.name: Chilling Spray
spells.effectSummary: A cone of icy shards bursts from your spread hands and coats the targets in a layer of frost.

spells.name: Chroma Leach
spells.effectSummary: Your hand glows with impossible colors from beyond the stars, and your touch saps both color and vitality from the living.

spells.name: Chromatic Armor
spells.effectSummary: You wrap the target in armor made of sheets of colored light.

spells.name: Chromatic Image
spells.effectSummary: You call forth three illusory images of yourself, and each of the four of you takes on a different color, your colors all shifting each time someone attacks you.

spells.name: Chromatic Ray
spells.effectSummary: You send out a ray of colored light streaming toward your enemy, with a magical effect depending on the ray's color.

spells.name: Chromatic Wall
spells.effectSummary: You create an opaque wall of light in a single vibrant color.

spells.name: Chrysopoetic Curse
spells.effectSummary: You grant the target the gift of riches, giving them the power to turn anything they touch to gold.

spells.name: Chthonian Wrath
spells.effectSummary: You evoke the energy of a part of the Outer Rifts.

spells.name: Cinder Gaze
spells.effectSummary: You've learned to read the future in the patterns of flames and smoke.

spells.name: Cinder Swarm
spells.effectSummary: You breathe life into a mass of fiery critters.

spells.name: Circle of Protection
spells.effectSummary: You ward a creature and those nearby against a specified alignment.

spells.name: City of Sin
spells.effectSummary: Area 7-mile-radius circle centered on you

spells.name: Clad In Metal
spells.targets: 1 metal object of 5 Bulk or less that's unattended or attended by a willing creature
spells.effectSummary: You briefly swap the outer surface of the metal in an object with a suitable amount of a common precious metal from the Plane of Metal.

spells.name: Claim Curse
spells.effectSummary: By burning threads of fate around a target and then retying them to yourself instead, you temporarily draw their curse to you and offer them brief succor from the worst of its effects.

spells.name: Claim Undead
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to wrest control of a target undead or force it to recognize you as its master.

spells.name: Clairaudience
spells.effectSummary: You create an Invisible floating ear at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

spells.name: Clairvoyance
spells.effectSummary: You create an Invisible floating eye at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect).

spells.name: Claws of the Otter
spells.effectSummary: Webbing grows between your fingers and your nails extend into vicious claws.

spells.name: Clawsong
spells.targets: 1 willing creature with an unarmed claw Strike
spells.effectSummary: You sing a fierce prayer, low and growling, and awaken the ancient spirit of a Terwa beast to guide and strengthen the target's unarmed blows.

spells.name: Cleanse Affliction
spells.effectSummary: Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies.

spells.name: Cleanse Air
spells.effectSummary: You purify the air in the area, making it clean and breathable.

spells.name: Cleanse Cuisine
spells.effectSummary: You transform all food and beverages in the area into delicious fare, changing water into wine or another fine beverage, or enhancing the food's taste and ingredients to make it a gourmet treat.

spells.name: Cleansing Flames
spells.effectSummary: You wrap the target in purifying flames.

spells.name: Clear Mind
spells.effectSummary: You drive mental contamination from the target's mind.

spells.name: Clinging Ice
spells.effectSummary: Freezing sleet and heavy snowfall collect on the target's feet and legs, dealing 1d4 cold damage and other effects depending on its Reflex save.

spells.name: Clinging Shadows Stance
spells.effectSummary: You adopt the stance of clinging shadows.

spells.name: Cloak of Colors
spells.effectSummary: A cloak of swirling colors shrouds the target.

spells.name: Cloak of Light
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in holy light that restores the living and rebuffs undead.

spells.name: Cloak of Shadow
spells.effectSummary: You drape the target in a mantle of swirling shadows that make it harder to see.

spells.name: Clockwork Devotion
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You toss a handful of magical cogs before you, summoning a battalion of clockwork soldiers to fight your enemies.

spells.name: Clone
spells.effectSummary: You collect hair, nail clippings, and samples of skin and blood from the target, who must be present throughout the ritual and can be one of the casters.

spells.name: Clone Companion
spells.effectSummary: You create a duplicate of your companion, and the duplicate fights alongside its twin, mirroring the original's actions.

spells.name: Cloud Current
spells.effectSummary: Air and water vapor combine into a great cloud that funnels a powerful current within it.

spells.name: Cloud Dragon's Cloak
spells.targets: the creature targeted by the attack
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or an ally in range is targeted by a ranged attack.

spells.name: Clouded Focus
spells.effectSummary: You sharpen a creature's senses, though more distant objects become hazy, indistinct, or muted to it.

spells.name: Clownish Curse
spells.effectSummary: You afflict the target with a curse that causes it to emit ridiculous noises as it moves.

spells.name: Coiling Dance
spells.effectSummary: You perform a dance that seeks to pass on the knowledge and wisdom of a naga.

spells.name: Collective Memories
spells.effectSummary: You tap into other mortals' memories, knowledge, legends, tales, and lore about a subject.

spells.name: Collective Transposition
spells.effectSummary: You teleport the targets to new positions within the area.

spells.name: Combustion
spells.effectSummary: You ignite a creature in lasting flames.

spells.name: Command
spells.duration: until the end of the target's next turn
spells.effectSummary: You shout a command that's hard to ignore.

spells.name: Commanding Lash
spells.targets: A creature you dealt damage to on your most recent action.
spells.duration: until the end of your target's next turn
spells.effectSummary: With the threat of more pain, you compel a creature you've recently harmed.

spells.name: Commune
spells.effectSummary: You call upon an unknown, powerful being to answer questions.

spells.name: Commune with Corazal
spells.effectSummary: You tap into Corazal's innumerable senses to identify disturbances throughout the Verduran Forest.

spells.name: Community Repair
spells.targets: 1 damaged or broken public work no larger than 3,000 cubic feet (the size of a Huge creature)
spells.effectSummary: You lead your community in repairing a public work, such as a bridge, well, or mural, through the power of memory and art.

spells.name: Community Restoration
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You Cast a Spell from a wizard spell slot, and the spell affects one or more willing allies without damaging them.

spells.name: Compel True Name
spells.targets: 1 creature whose true name you know
spells.effectSummary: You instruct the target to do something, compelling obedience by calling it by its true name.

spells.name: Competitive Edge
spells.effectSummary: Your competitiveness drives you to prove yourself against the opposition.

spells.name: Concealment's Curtain
spells.effectSummary: At twilight for 5 days, you line the fruit in front of the mirror, chanting the name of the target, and envisioning its eyes in your mind.

spells.name: Concordant Choir
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a dangerous consonance of reverberating sound, focusing on a single target or spreading out to damage many foes.

spells.name: Conductive Weapon
spells.targets: 1 metal weapon that is unattended or is wielded by you or a willing ally
spells.effectSummary: You channel powerful electric current through the metal of a weapon, zapping anyone the item hits.

spells.name: Cone of Cold
spells.effectSummary: Icy cold rushes forth from your hands.

spells.name: Confetti Cloud
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a dense storm of swirling confetti.

spells.name: Confront Selves
spells.effectSummary: You show the target the spiraling web of actions and consequences that is their life and the changes wrought by these decisions upon themselves and those around them.

spells.name: Confusing Colors
spells.effectSummary: A cloud of cascading, ever-changing colors manifests in the air.

spells.name: Confusing Cry
spells.effectSummary: You give an unsettling, warbling cry that causes nearby creatures to lash out without control.

spells.name: Confusion
spells.effectSummary: You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly.

spells.name: Conjured Clockwork
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a complex clockwork device on the ground and cause it to slowly spread across the battlefield.

spells.name: Conjured Conveyance
spells.effectSummary: You conjure an intricate vehicle, carved entirely from wood, to serve as a method of conveyance.

spells.name: Conquering Soldiers
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You tap into the glories of the armies of old, bringing forth their might to your battlefield and making their strength and power your own.

spells.name: Consecrate
spells.effectSummary: Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

spells.name: Consecrate Flesh
spells.effectSummary: Through the strength of your faith, your body becomes infused with holy energy.

spells.name: Construct Mindscape
spells.effectSummary: You create an entirely mental environment called an immersive mindscape.

spells.name: Consuming Darkness
spells.effectSummary: Your shadow wriggles before spreading out from you, forming a gateway of clinging, consuming shadow through which the horrors of another plane can barely be seen.

spells.name: Contact Friends
spells.effectSummary: You meditate for a quiet moment before your mind seeks out others whom you have befriended, as well as friends of any of the secondary casters.

spells.name: Contagious Idea
spells.targets: 1 or 2 creatures other than yourself (see text)
spells.effectSummary: Nothing is so contagious as a thought.

spells.name: Containment
spells.effectSummary: You wrap a creature in an immobile force field, whether to protect it or those around it.

spells.name: Contingency
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You prepare a spell that will trigger later.

spells.name: Control Sand
spells.effectSummary: You whip up a small sandstorm around your body.

spells.name: Control Water
spells.effectSummary: Area 50 feet long by 50 feet wide

spells.name: Control Weather
spells.effectSummary: Area 2-mile-radius circle centered on you

spells.name: Coral Eruption
spells.effectSummary: Area two 10-foot bursts that don't overlap

spells.name: Coral Scourge
spells.effectSummary: Barnacles, coral, and other rough aquatic creatures grow on the target's body, getting in between their joints and stiffening their movement.

spells.name: Cordyceps Command
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a mote of cordyceps spores uniquely tailored to the target before whisking it at them.

spells.name: Cornucopia
spells.effectSummary: Vines twine into a wicker horn in your hands, and out spills a single fruit, nut, or similar small bit of produce.

spells.name: Corpse Communion
spells.effectSummary: The dead hold more secrets than the living ever shall.

spells.name: Corrosive Body
spells.effectSummary: You exhale corrosive gas, and acidic secretions coat your skin as you transform into a being of living acid.

spells.name: Corrosive Muck
spells.effectSummary: Area all squares in two @Template[burst|distance:10]{10-foot bursts}.

spells.name: Cosmic Form
spells.effectSummary: You recreate your form entirely out of cosmic energy, transforming into a Large battle form.

spells.name: Counter Performance
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or an ally within 60 feet rolls a saving throw against an auditory or visual effect.

spells.name: Countless Eyes
spells.effectSummary: Eyes form across the touched creature's body, allowing it to see in all directions at once.

spells.name: Courageous Anthem
spells.effectSummary: You inspire yourself and your allies with words or tunes of encouragement.

spells.name: Cozy Cabin
spells.effectSummary: You shape a cabin 20 feet on each side and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Crashing Wave
spells.effectSummary: You summon a crashing wave that sweeps away from you.

spells.name: Create Demiplane
spells.effectSummary: Few incantations are as renowned as the power to create worlds.

spells.name: Create Food
spells.effectSummary: You create enough food to feed six Medium creatures for a day.

spells.name: Create Mycoguardian
spells.effectSummary: You transform the target into an fungus creature with a level up to that allowed in the below table.

spells.name: Create Skinstitch
spells.targets: 1 frame covered in the skin of sentient humanoids
spells.effectSummary: You transform the target into a skinstitch, a hideous construct covered in the flesh of sentient humanoids.

spells.name: Create Undead
spells.effectSummary: You transform the target into an undead creature with a level up to that allowed in the Creature Creation Rituals table.

spells.name: Create Water
spells.effectSummary: As you cup your hands, water begins to flow forth from them.

spells.name: Creation
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a temporary object from magical energy.

spells.name: Creative Splash
spells.effectSummary: A deluge of paint or colorful illusions descend on the area, reflecting your personal creative specialty.

spells.name: Crescent Scepter
spells.duration: until the beginning of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You hold up any object, which takes on the appearance of glowing regalia in the eyes of those who look on you, representing the political or religious institute most feared by each creature.

spells.name: Crimson Breath
spells.effectSummary: You turn a creature toward you and exhale a blast of crimson mist from your mouth, exposing the target to a toxic miasma.

spells.name: Crisis of Faith
spells.effectSummary: You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells.

spells.name: Croak Voice
spells.effectSummary: You cause the target creature's vocal chords to swell like those of a frog.

spells.name: Crown of Prophets
spells.effectSummary: Serpents sprout from your head, equally ready to bite your foes or offer you counsel.

spells.name: Crusade
spells.effectSummary: You issue a divine mandate or proclaim a cause to the targets.

spells.name: Crushing Ground
spells.effectSummary: You tear open the ground then slam it shut.

spells.name: Cry of Destruction
spells.effectSummary: Your voice booms, smashing what's in front of you.

spells.name: Cup of Dust
spells.effectSummary: You curse the target with a thirst no drink can quench.

spells.name: Curse of Calamity
spells.effectSummary: You condemn your targets to violent misfortune.

spells.name: Curse of Death
spells.effectSummary: Your patron wraps a hand around your target's heart.

spells.name: Curse of Lost Time
spells.targets: 1 Large or smaller object, construct, or living creature
spells.effectSummary: You curse the target with rapid aging or erosion.

spells.name: Curse of Recoil
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An enemy you can see is about to make a ranged attack.

spells.name: Curse of the Spirit Orchestra
spells.effectSummary: You summon an Invisible, insubstantial group of extraplanar musicians who follow the target and play distracting music to hinder its actions.

spells.name: Cursed Metamorphosis
spells.effectSummary: You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

spells.name: Cutting Eye
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You are the target of an attack or must attempt a saving throw against a spell.

spells.name: Cutting Insult
spells.effectSummary: You utter an insult so offensive that it cuts your target to the quick.

spells.name: Cycle of Retribution
spells.effectSummary: An understanding of how violence begets more violence fills your target, causing it mental anguish in the form of splitting headaches when it attempts to take violent actions.

spells.name: Cyclone Rondo
spells.effectSummary: Playing or singing melodies discovered by the ancient Shory, you call up a whirlwind.

spells.name: Déjà Vu
spells.effectSummary: You loop a thought process in the target's mind, forcing it to repeat a moment's worth of actions.

spells.name: Daemon Form
spells.effectSummary: You infuse yourself with the corrupting death and pure malevolence of Abaddon, transforming into a Large daemon battle form.

spells.name: Daemonic Pact
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the powers of Abaddon to grant you the assistance of a daemon.

spells.name: Dance of Darkness
spells.effectSummary: You dance, Striding up to half your Speed.

spells.name: Dancing Blade
spells.effectSummary: You telekinetically animate a weapon that's unattended or on your person.

spells.name: Dancing Fountain
spells.effectSummary: Area 30-foot burst centered on you

spells.name: Dancing Shield
spells.targets: 1 touched shield (unattended or in your possession) and 1 willing creature
spells.effectSummary: You levitate the touched shield and send it to orbit around a creature.

spells.name: Darkened Eyes
spells.effectSummary: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness.

spells.name: Darkened Forest Form
spells.effectSummary: Your apparition casts a feral shadow over your form.

spells.name: Darkened Sight
spells.effectSummary: You infuse a creature's vision with darkness.

spells.name: Darklight
spells.effectSummary: Shadows pour forth from your eyes, creating a field of darkness that prevents light from emanating within the area.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.effectSummary: You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.effectSummary: You grant yourself supernatural sight in areas of darkness.

spells.name: Dawnflower's Light
spells.targets: 1 unattended, non-magical object of 1 Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: The object glows with soft golden light that lays bare the truth, reveals hidden objects, and shines supernatural light on false orders.

spells.name: Daydreamer's Curse
spells.effectSummary: You impose a curse upon the target that renders it easily distracted and unable to focus its thoughts on tasks that demand insight or discernment.

spells.name: Day's Weight
spells.effectSummary: You fast-forward time for a single creature, burdening it with the aches and pain of an entire day and making it temporarily tired and weak.

spells.name: Daze
spells.effectSummary: You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt.

spells.name: Dazzling Flash
spells.effectSummary: You raise your religious symbol and create a blinding flash of light.

spells.name: Deafness
spells.effectSummary: The target loses hearing; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

spells.name: Death Knell
spells.effectSummary: You snuff the life out of a creature on the brink of death.

spells.name: Death Ward
spells.effectSummary: You shield a creature from the ravages of void energy.

spells.name: Deathless March
spells.effectSummary: You chant a marching song of Yled to empower the undead and terrify the living.

spells.name: Death's Call
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A living creature within 20 feet of you dies, or an undead creature within 20 feet of you is destroyed.

spells.name: Debilitating Dichotomy
spells.effectSummary: You reveal a glimpse of the impossible conflicts between the divine anathema behind your curse, forcing you to reckon with another's conflicts as well.

spells.name: Debilitating Terror
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You fill the target's mind with terrifying images to disrupt their combat focus.

spells.name: Deceiver's Cloak
spells.effectSummary: Your patron drapes a cloak of illusion about you, making you appear as another creature of the same body shape with roughly similar height and weight as yourself.

spells.name: Deep Breath
spells.effectSummary: You take an incredibly deep breath and can hold it for the spell's duration.

spells.name: Deep Sight
spells.effectSummary: Your eyes darken until they become entirely pitch black.

spells.name: Defended by Spirits
spells.effectSummary: You entreat a spirit or the spiritual energies in your location to surround and protect an ally from an certain foe.

spells.name: Dehydrate
spells.effectSummary: You stir the inner fire of all things within the area, driving out moisture.

spells.name: Deity's Strike
spells.effectSummary: A manifested version of your deity's favored weapon appears in the air above and attacks the target, using your spell attack roll.

spells.name: Delay Affliction
spells.effectSummary: With a surge of healing energy, you push back against an affliction threatening the target and grant a small amount of healing.

spells.name: Delay Consequence
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature or object within range is hit by an attack.

spells.name: Deluge
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a catastrophic downpour in the area that vanishes an instant later.

spells.name: Delusional Pride
spells.effectSummary: You make the target overconfident, leading it to ascribe failure to external factors.

spells.name: Demon Form
spells.effectSummary: You corrupt yourself with the sin of the Outer Rifts, transforming into a Medium demon battle form.

spells.name: Demonic Pact
spells.effectSummary: You call in a favor from one demon of level 2 or lower, two demons of level 0 or lower, or three demons of level –1 or lower.

spells.name: Desiccate
spells.effectSummary: You pull the moisture from the targets' bodies, dealing 10d10 void damage.

spells.name: Desperate Repair
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A shield within range would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by a damaging effect

spells.name: Destructive Aura
spells.effectSummary: Swirling sands of divine devastation surround you, weakening the defenses of all they touch.

spells.name: Detect Alignment
spells.effectSummary: Your eyes glow as you sense aligned auras.

spells.name: Detect Creator
spells.effectSummary: You examine the remains or spiritual residue of a destroyed undead creature to locate that undead's creator, perhaps a necromancer or vampire.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.effectSummary: You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic.

spells.name: Detect Metal
spells.effectSummary: You attune yourself to magnetic fields, becoming aware of the presence or absence of metallic objects, veins, and deposits within the area.

spells.name: Detect Poison
spells.effectSummary: You detect whether a creature is venomous or poisonous, or if an object is poison or has been poisoned.

spells.name: Detect Scrying
spells.effectSummary: By reading trace auras, you detect the presence of scrying effects in the area.

spells.name: Detonate Magic
spells.effectSummary: You cause the magic within the target to dissipate in a destructive explosion.

spells.name: Devil Form
spells.effectSummary: You bind yourself to the power of Hell, transforming into a Medium devil battle form.

spells.name: Devour Life
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to utterly consume the target's life force.

spells.name: Devouring Dark Form
spells.effectSummary: Your apparition's dark power blends with your physical body, allowing you to take on terrifying characteristics of creatures that lurk in dark places.

spells.name: Devouring Void
spells.effectSummary: Countless tears in space appear in the area, like hungry mouths.

spells.name: Diabolic Edict
spells.effectSummary: You issue a diabolic edict, demanding the target perform a particular task and offering rewards for its fulfillment.

spells.name: Diabolic Pact
spells.effectSummary: You make an appeal to a powerful devil, asking them to bind some of their subordinates to your service.

spells.name: Diadem of Divine Radiance
spells.effectSummary: You don a diadem of radiant light, which sheds bright light to a range of 60 feet and dim light to a further 60 feet.

spells.name: Diamond Dust

spells.name: Dim the Light

spells.name: Divine Inspiration

spells.name: Divine Wrath

spells.name: Door to Beyond
