spells.effectSummary: You light all non-magical light sources in the area that use fire to provide their light—such as candles, lamps, and sconces.

spells.name: Illusory Creature
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusory image of a Large or smaller creature.

spells.name: Illusory Disguise
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusion that causes the target to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds).

spells.name: Illusory Object
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusory visual image of a stationary object.

spells.name: Illusory Scene
spells.effectSummary: You craft an imaginary scene that includes up to 10 discrete creatures or objects of various sizes, all of which must be within the spell's area.

spells.name: Illusory Shroud
spells.effectSummary: You shroud the target in subtle illusions that make it difficult to detect.

spells.name: Imaginary Lockbox
spells.targets: 1 container and its contents, totaling 10 Bulk or less
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You turn a container and its contents into an imaginary form stored in your mind that only you can see and interact with.

spells.name: Imaginary Weapon
spells.effectSummary: You create a simple weapon of force and lash out, its arc following your hand.

spells.name: Imitate Fauna
spells.effectSummary: You use your knowledge of nature to pass the target off as a common animal of the same size, representing a species chosen when the spell is cast.

spells.name: Imp Sting
spells.effectSummary: You reproduce an imp's evil, poisonous sting, stabbing at an enemy and possibly affecting them with the devil's benumbing venom.

spells.name: Impaling Briars
spells.effectSummary: The ground within the area transforms into a mass of dangerous briars that assault and impede your foes.

spells.name: Impaling Spike
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a spike that thrusts up from the earth beneath a target creature, potentially impaling it.

spells.name: Impart Empathy
spells.effectSummary: You expand the target's ability to understand social cues that are normally beyond its comprehension.

spells.name: Impeccable Flow
spells.effectSummary: You attune yourself to an underlying cosmic order to the world.

spells.name: Impending Doom
spells.effectSummary: You sift through myriad potential futures, seize upon one potential moment in which the target meets a particularly gruesome and fatal end, and then show it a vision of its impending demise.

spells.name: Implement of Destruction
spells.targets: 1 enemy, and 1 weapon that is either unattended or wielded by you or a willing ally
spells.effectSummary: You solemnly declare that the target weapon will bring death to a foe, implanting an irrational fear of the weapon into the target enemy's mind.

spells.name: Implosion
spells.effectSummary: You crush the target by causing it to collapse in on itself, dealing 75 damage.

spells.name: Imprint Message
spells.effectSummary: You project psychic vibrations onto the target object, imprinting it with a short message or emotional theme of your design.

spells.name: Imprisonment
spells.effectSummary: You perform a ritual to imprison a creature in one of several forms.

spells.name: Incarnate Ancestry
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to reach back through time to make brief contact with one of the many past lives of the willing creature, then transform their current body to incarnate elements of that past life's anc...

spells.name: Incendiary Ashes
spells.effectSummary: A cloud of magical ashes descends upon creatures in the area.

spells.name: Incendiary Aura
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself with a combustible aura.

spells.name: Incendiary Fog
spells.effectSummary: You summon a cloud of flammable black dust.

spells.name: Indestructibility
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You sever yourself from cause and effect.

spells.name: Indolent Haze
spells.effectSummary: The faint scent of poppies and a soothing calm fill the area, urging creatures to lay down and take a rest, to do nothing at all, ever again.

spells.name: Inevitable Destination
spells.effectSummary: You twist the paths of the target, ensuring that each one leads to you.

spells.name: Inevitable Disaster
spells.effectSummary: You briefly glimpse cause and effect, putting into motion a chain of events that will visit doom on your enemy at some point in the future, though you're not quite sure when or how the doom will oc...

spells.name: Inexhaustible Cynicism
spells.effectSummary: You inflict your targets with a crushing doubt about everyone and everything around them.

spells.name: Infectious Comedy
spells.effectSummary: You tell a magical joke and infect a target with laughter that spreads to those nearby.

spells.name: Infectious Ennui
spells.effectSummary: With a wave of your hand and a short invocation, you cause feelings of ennui and impending doom to well up in the mind of the targeted creature, who must attempt a Will save.

spells.name: Infectious Enthusiasm
spells.effectSummary: With enchanted gusto, you encourage yourself to get things done and share your motivation with your allies.

spells.name: Infectious Melody
spells.effectSummary: You call forth the chords of a tune so catchy that foes hearing it can't help but sing along, making it harder for them to communicate.

spells.name: Infiltrator's Tunnel
spells.effectSummary: It's best to know the ingress and egress points for any location you plan to rob.

spells.name: Information Overload
spells.effectSummary: You call on Cobyslarni to open the target's mind to knowledge—too much knowledge.

spells.name: Infuse Vitality
spells.effectSummary: You empower attacks with vital energy.

spells.name: Inkshot
spells.effectSummary: A spray of viscous, toxic ink jets from your fingertip to strike a target creature in the face.

spells.name: Inner Radiance Torrent
spells.effectSummary: You gradually manifest your spiritual energy into your cupped hands before firing off a storm of bolts and beams that deal 4d4 force damage to all creatures in a 60-foot line.

spells.name: Inner Upheaval
spells.effectSummary: You focus your qi into devastating magical attacks.

spells.name: Inscrutable Mask
spells.effectSummary: You shroud your form and features in an impenetrable mask of shadow.

spells.name: Insect Form
spells.effectSummary: You envision a simple bug and transform into a Medium animal battle form.

spells.name: Inside Ropes
spells.effectSummary: You pull a large handful of guts from your midsection.

spells.name: Instant Armor
spells.effectSummary: Upon casting this spell, the armor you're wearing is whisked away into an extradimensional space that's linked to you.

spells.name: Instant Minefield
spells.effectSummary: You create several hidden mines throughout the area that explode when stepped on.

spells.name: Instant Parade
spells.effectSummary: An illusory parade with dozens of participants and performers appears around you, following you as you move.

spells.name: Instant Pottery
spells.effectSummary: You pull earthen material out of the environment, then shape it into one or more earthenware objects that, in combination, can be up to light Bulk.

spells.name: Interdisciplinary Incantation
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within 30 feet casts an arcane spell.

spells.name: Internal Insurrection
spells.effectSummary: You afflict the target with the supernatural disease known as internal insurrection, causing portions of their body to rebel against the whole, leading to painful agonies and, in time, death.

spells.name: Interplanar Teleport
spells.effectSummary: Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus

spells.name: Interposing Earth
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You are the target of a Strike or would attempt a Reflex save against a damaging area effect.

spells.name: Interstellar Void
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the frigid depths of outer space to bring a terrible chill to your enemy.

spells.name: Inveigle
spells.targets: 1 creature of a level no greater than double the inveigle ritual's rank
spells.effectSummary: You win over the target's mind, causing it to see you as a close and trusted friend and look upon your every suggestion as reasonable.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.effectSummary: Illusions bend light around the target, rendering it Invisible.

spells.name: Invisibility Cloak
spells.effectSummary: You become Invisible, with the same restrictions as the 2nd-rank Invisibility spell.

spells.name: Invisibility Curtain
spells.effectSummary: You create a transparent invisible wall that makes any creatures on one side of the wall invisible to those on the other side.

spells.name: Invisible Item
spells.effectSummary: You make the object Invisible.

spells.name: Invoke Spirits
spells.effectSummary: Ragged apparitions of the dead rise to stalk the living.

spells.name: Invoke the Crimson Oath
spells.effectSummary: Brandishing your weapon and shouting the final line of the Crimson Oath, you unleash a blast of destructive ruby energy.

spells.name: Invoke the Harrow
spells.effectSummary: You draw a card from the harrow, either one from a deck you have in hand or magically produce one as part of the spell.

spells.name: Invoke True Name
spells.targets: 1 creature whose true name you know
spells.effectSummary: You speak the true name of a creature to more surely affect it with your magic.

spells.name: Iron Gut
spells.effectSummary: Your mouth, esophagus, and stomach become incredibly elastic and tougher than metal.

spells.name: Isolation
spells.effectSummary: You summon a tangible manifestation of loneliness to cloak the target from view as surely as if it were wreathed in darkness.

spells.name: It is Written
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You envision a future for yourself, confident in the certainty that this vision is your destiny.

spells.name: Item Facade
spells.targets: 1 object no more than 10 feet by 10 feet by 10 feet
spells.effectSummary: You make the target object look and feel as though it were in much better or worse physical condition.

spells.name: Jassim's Allegiance
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You bartered for this spell in some strange market or perhaps gained it while wandering the desert, hopelessly lost and surrounded by nothing but the remnants of time and fallen empires.

spells.name: Jealous Hex
spells.effectSummary: You draw forth a hag's innate jealousy to deny a target its greatest attribute.

spells.name: Join Pasts
spells.effectSummary: With touches to the targets' foreheads, you bring them into mental communion.

spells.name: Jump
spells.effectSummary: Your legs surge with strength, ready to leap high and far.

spells.name: Juvenile Companion
spells.effectSummary: You transform your companion into its juvenile form, such as a cub, foal, kitten, puppy, or piglet, making the target appear harmless.

spells.name: Kaiju Ward
spells.effectSummary: You protect a physical structure from the devastation caused by immense creatures.

spells.name: Keen Smell
spells.effectSummary: Your nose becomes more sensitive to the scents of the wild, the better for you to track your quarry.

spells.name: Kgalaserke's Axes
spells.effectSummary: The folklore and tales surrounding the legendary hero Kgalaserke are so widespread and well known that a hundred lifetimes would not be enough to have accomplished everything she is reputed to have...

spells.name: Ki Cutting Sight
spells.effectSummary: Ki flows through everything in existence—animals and plants, living and dead, mortals and spirits.

spells.name: Kinetic Ram
spells.effectSummary: Gathering kinetic energy, you either focus it in a straight line or disperse it as an encircling ripple.

spells.name: King's Castle
spells.effectSummary: You and a willing creature swap places.

spells.name: Knock
spells.effectSummary: You make the target easier to open.

spells.name: Know Location
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You create an invisible anchor at a location within range (even if it's outside your line of sight or line of effect), as long as you can identify the location by its appearance (or other identifyi...

spells.name: Know the Enemy
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You roll initiative and can see a creature, you succeed at an attack roll against a creature, or a creature fails a saving throw against one of your spells.

spells.name: Know the Way
spells.effectSummary: In your mind's eye, you magically reorient yourself.

spells.name: Labyrinthine Prison
spells.effectSummary: This ritual was developed by a long-dead minotaur hero-god whose cult trained to hunt and trap evil beings.

spells.name: Lament
spells.effectSummary: You let out your negative emotions in a guttural wail that shakes your enemies' hearts and deals 1d8 mental damage (basic Will save) to each creature in the area.

spells.name: Lashing Rope
spells.targets: up to 50 feet of unattended rope or an inanimate rope-like object
spells.effectSummary: You cause a section of rope or a rope-like object to animate, slither to your square, and encircle you, wreathing you in twisting, lashing fibers.

spells.name: Lashunta's Life Bubble
spells.effectSummary: You create a replenishing protective bubble of fresh, temperate air around the target.

spells.name: Last Night's Vigil
spells.effectSummary: Obscure folktales state on the first day of spring, the Mother of Secrets wanders Tian Xia to dispense blessings of health upon the elderly.

spells.name: Laughing Fit
spells.effectSummary: The target is overtaken with uncontrollable laughter.

spells.name: Lay on Hands
spells.targets: 1 willing living creature or 1 undead creature
spells.effectSummary: Your hands become infused with powerful vitality, capable of healing a living creature or damaging an undead creature with a touch.

spells.name: Leaden Steps
spells.effectSummary: You partially transform a foe's feet into unwieldy slabs of metal, slowing their steps.

spells.name: Leng Sting
spells.effectSummary: You use the power of nightmares to magically replicate the venomous attack of the aberrant and cunning Leng spiders.

spells.name: Let Not the Fallen Rest
spells.effectSummary: You exhort your fallen comrades to return to the battle.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.effectSummary: You defy gravity and levitate the target 5 feet off the ground.

spells.name: Liberating Command
spells.effectSummary: You call out a liberating cry, urging an ally to break free of an effect that holds them in place.

spells.name: Life Boost
spells.effectSummary: Life force from your patron floods into the target, ensuring they can continue doing your patron's will for just a little longer.

spells.name: Life Connection
spells.effectSummary: When you cast this spell, you place a failsafe deep within the life force of the target.

spells.name: Life-Draining Roots
spells.effectSummary: Thorny roots erupt from your hands in a tangled cascade, puncturing creatures in the way of their growth and revitalizing you.

spells.name: Life-Giving Form
spells.effectSummary: You transcend your physical form, becoming a beacon of healing energy.

spells.name: Life Link
spells.effectSummary: You forge a connection of life energy between you and your target, distributing harm between both of you.

spells.name: Life Pact
spells.effectSummary: Using your life force or spirit as a conduit, you bind the targets in a mystical pact.

spells.name: Life Siphon
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You expend one of your wizard spell slots to cast a wizard spell of the necromancy school.

spells.name: Lifelink Surge
spells.effectSummary: You make a quick gesture, tracing the link between yourself and your eidolon and drawing on your connection to slowly strengthen your shared life force.

spells.name: Life's Flowing River
spells.effectSummary: You create a flowing river of ghostly water and that sheds dim light for 10 feet on each side.

spells.name: Life's Fresh Bloom
spells.effectSummary: The ground around you blooms with life, sprouting sparkling grass, flowers, and small shrubs.

spells.name: Lifewood Cage
spells.range: 30 feet; 1 cube 20 feet on each side
spells.effectSummary: You create an immobile, Invisible prison of hardened wood suffused with vital energy from the Forge of Creation.

spells.name: Lift Nature's Caul
spells.effectSummary: With a wave of the hand, you cause all creatures in the area to see the world around them as if a gauzy film had been lifted away to expose the truth that lies below their perceived reality.

spells.name: Light
spells.effectSummary: You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose.

spells.name: Light of Revelation
spells.effectSummary: You shed a luminous aura, illuminating a 30-foot radius with bright light.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.effectSummary: A bolt of lightning strikes outward from your hand, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

spells.name: Lightning Storm
spells.effectSummary: You create a black, rumbling storm cloud and call down one lightning bolt within the spell's area.

spells.name: Lignify
spells.effectSummary: You turn the target's flesh slowly into wood.

spells.name: Liminal Doorway
spells.effectSummary: You draw a chalk doorway on an unbroken surface, which opens into an extradimensional space.

spells.name: Lingering Composition
spells.effectSummary: You add a flourish to your composition to extend its benefits.

spells.name: Linnorm Sting
spells.effectSummary: You replicate the fiery venom of the tor linnorm and inflict an enemy with the dread dragon's debilitating bite.

spells.name: Live Wire
spells.effectSummary: You conjure up a length of sharp copper filament humming with electrical current that strikes out at your foe.

spells.name: Localized Quake
spells.effectSummary: You shake the earth, toppling nearby creatures.

spells.name: Locate
spells.targets: 1 specific object or type of object
spells.effectSummary: You learn the direction to the target (if you picked a specific object, such as "my mother's sword") or the nearest target (if you picked a type of object, such as "swords").

spells.name: Lock
spells.targets: 1 lock, or a door or container with a latch
spells.effectSummary: The target's latch mechanism clinks shut, held fast by unseen magical wards.

spells.name: Lock Item
spells.targets: 1 object held by 1 creature and the creature holding it
spells.effectSummary: One object held by a creature becomes fused to that creature's hand and can't be put down.

spells.name: Loose Time's Arrow
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You pluck the time stream like a bow—pull one string back, release, and watch a creature fly.

spells.name: Loremaster's Etude
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or an ally within range attempts a skill check to Recall Knowledge

spells.name: Lose the Path
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature in range Strides

spells.name: Lotus Walk
spells.effectSummary: Lotuses, water lilies, and other watery plants bloom at your feet, allowing you to walk on the surface of water and other liquids.

spells.name: Love's Sacrifice
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You take damage that would reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

spells.name: Lucky Break
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You fail, but don't critically fail, a saving throw.

spells.name: Lucky Month
spells.effectSummary: You imbue the provided token with luck.

spells.name: Lucky Number
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: When you Cast this Spell, roll 1d20 and make a note of the result.

spells.name: Luminous Stardust Healing
spells.effectSummary: You scatter twinkling sparks from your sentinel weapon, replenishing your allies' fighting spirit and driving out evil.

spells.name: Lure Dream
spells.effectSummary: You reach out to the dream realm, beckoning an animate dream to your side.

spells.name: Luring Wail
spells.effectSummary: You emit a plaintive cry to lure your enemies closer.

spells.name: Mad Monkeys
spells.effectSummary: Magical monkey spirits fill the area as they pile and climb on top of one another.

spells.name: Magic Hide
spells.effectSummary: Your animal companion grows a thicker hide, matted fur, or a harder shell, granting it a +1 status bonus to AC.

spells.name: Magic Mailbox
spells.targets: 2 containers, each no larger than 5 feet in any dimension
spells.effectSummary: You create an interdimensional link between two containers, both of which must be capable of being closed in such a way that their contents aren't visible.

spells.name: Magic Passage
spells.effectSummary: You create a visible tunnel through the wall in the chosen area, replacing the area with empty space.

spells.name: Magic Stone
spells.targets: 1 to 3 non-magical stones or sling bullets
spells.effectSummary: You pour vitality energy into ordinary stones, granting them temporary magical properties.

spells.name: Magic Warrior Aspect
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the aspect of the animal from your mask, gaining physical features reminiscent of that animal.

spells.name: Magic Warrior Transformation
spells.effectSummary: You transform into the animal from your mask.

spells.name: Magical Fetters
spells.effectSummary: Ghostly manacles launch from your outstretched hand and clasp around the target's limbs, impeding its movements.

spells.name: Magic's Vessel
spells.effectSummary: A creature becomes a divine receptacle for pure magical energy.

spells.name: Magnetic Acceleration
spells.effectSummary: You magnetize a small metal object, such as a nail or coin, and launch it away from you at massive speed.

spells.name: Magnetic Attraction
spells.targets: up to 10 metal objects with a total Bulk of 1 or less
spells.effectSummary: You adjust your magnetic polarity, plucking daggers from hands and coins from belts.

spells.name: Magnetic Dominion
spells.targets: any number of creatures wearing metal armor, creatures made of metal, creatures that have the metal trait, and unattended metal objects
spells.effectSummary: The roiling magnetic fields of the Plane of Metal radiate from you as you channel and reshape them at your merest thought.

spells.name: Magnetic Repulsion
spells.effectSummary: You adjust your magnetic polarity, causing metal objects to jump and shudder away from you.

spells.name: Malediction
spells.effectSummary: You incite distress in the minds of your enemies, making it more difficult for them to defend themselves.

spells.name: Malicious Shadow
spells.effectSummary: Your patron warps the target's shadow into a deadly form, such as strangling hands, a dangerous weapon, harrying runes, or the like.

spells.name: Malignant Sustenance
spells.effectSummary: You embed a seed of void energy in an undead creature, restoring its unnatural vigor.

spells.name: Manifest Will
spells.effectSummary: You unleash energy from the broken connection to your patron.

spells.name: Manifestation
spells.effectSummary: You spin secrets from the fundaments of magic, shaping them into a power with nearly unlimited potential.

spells.name: Manifestation of Spirits
spells.effectSummary: You open the target's eyes to the plethora of spirits surrounding it—and it sees all these spirits as menacing and powerful.

spells.name: Manifold Lives
spells.effectSummary: You cast a creature's mind back through time, forcing them to take other paths and make other choices, experiencing countless alternate lives in an instant.

spells.name: Mantis Form
spells.effectSummary: You become a mantis.

spells.name: Mantis's Grasp
spells.effectSummary: You cause red, ghostly mantis arms to sprout from a nearby surface and crush a creature, dealing 8d6 force damage and attempting to pin the target in place.

spells.name: Mantle of Heaven's Slopes
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a mantle of heavenly power, invoking the power of the layers of the celestial mountain above.

spells.name: Mantle of the Frozen Heart
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a mantle of frigid ice magic, and your skin and armor morph into cold blue ice.

spells.name: Mantle of the Magma Heart
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a mantle of blazing fire magic, and your skin and anything you're wearing morphs into burning hot lava.

spells.name: Mantle of the Melting Heart
spells.effectSummary: You bathe yourself in a mantle of liquid metal, gilding your skin and armor with an oily sheen.

spells.name: Mantle of the Unwavering Heart
spells.effectSummary: Vines and branches envelop you in an instant, growing a wild bloom of colors that open to reveal your new form.

spells.name: Mariner's Curse
spells.effectSummary: You afflict the target with the curse of the roiling, unforgiving sea.

spells.name: Mark of Blood
spells.targets: 1 piercing or slashing weapon you're wielding
spells.effectSummary: You place a drop of your blood on a weapon and charge it with magic so that you transfer a small amount of your life essence with your attack.

spells.name: Martyr's Intervention
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within range would take damage that reduces it to 0 Hit Points

spells.name: Marvelous Mount
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a Large fantastical creature to serve as a mount for the target.

spells.name: Mask of Terror
spells.effectSummary: The target appears to be a gruesome and terrifying creature.

spells.name: Massacre
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a wave of death to snuff out the life force of those in its path.

spells.name: Maze of Locked Doors
spells.effectSummary: The target of your spell is drawn into a long, twisting, extradimensional hallway blocked at 30-foot intervals with high-grade duskwood doors (Hardness 20, HP 80, BT 40, Athletics DC 30 action:forc...

spells.name: Medusa's Wrath
spells.effectSummary: You make an attack filled with a medusa's petrifying power.

spells.name: Menacing Lament
spells.effectSummary: You wail a dirge for your enemies.

spells.name: Mending
spells.targets: non-magical object of light Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: You repair the target item.

spells.name: Mental Map
spells.effectSummary: You glean detailed information about a specific place visited by a creature directly from its mind, unless it fends you off with a Will save.

spells.name: Mercurial Stride
spells.effectSummary: Your form ripples as you take on the fluidity and toxicity of quicksilver.

spells.name: Message
spells.effectSummary: You mouth words quietly, but instead of coming out of your mouth, they're transferred directly to the ears of the target.

spells.name: Message Rune
spells.targets: 1 flat unattended surface or non-magical object of light Bulk
spells.effectSummary: You record a message up to 5 minutes long and inscribe a special rune on any flat unattended surface or small object within reach.

spells.name: Metamorphosis
spells.effectSummary: Harnessing your mastery of transformative magic, you hide forms within forms.

spells.name: Migration
spells.targets: you and up to 5 willing creatures
spells.effectSummary: The targets naturally take on animal forms most fitting their movement and environment.

spells.name: Mimic Spell
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature you're aware of within range Casts a Spell of the same tradition as mimic spell and of the same or lower rank.

spells.name: Mimic Undead
spells.effectSummary: You take death and wrap it about you like a cloak-your colors wash out and your skin grows cold to the touch.

spells.name: Mind Games
spells.effectSummary: You lock minds with the target, trying to mentally subdue them.

spells.name: Mind of Menace
spells.effectSummary: This spell wards against those who attempt to subvert your mind and turns mental magic back on them.

spells.name: Mind Probe
spells.effectSummary: You cast your thoughts through a creature's mind, sifting for information.

spells.name: Mind Reading
spells.duration: 1 round or sustained up to 1 minute
spells.effectSummary: With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind.

spells.name: Mind Swap
spells.targets: 2 creatures of the same ancestry, of up to twice the rank of mind swap
spells.effectSummary: This ritual allows two subjects to exchange minds, fully inhabiting one another's bodies.

spells.name: Mindlink
spells.effectSummary: You link your mind to the target's mind and mentally impart to that target an amount of information in an instant that could otherwise be communicated in 10 minutes.

spells.name: Mindscape Door
spells.targets: yourself and up to 5 willing creatures
spells.effectSummary: You project the targets into an immersive mindscape or cause them to exit one.

spells.name: Miracle
spells.effectSummary: You request aid directly from your divine source.

spells.name: Mirage
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusion that causes natural terrain to look, sound, feel, and smell like a different kind of terrain.

spells.name: Mirecloak
spells.effectSummary: You wrap the targeted creatures in thin, sickly green shrouds that sap information from attackers.

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.effectSummary: Three illusory images of you swirl about your space, potentially causing those who attack you to hit one of the images instead of you.

spells.name: Mirror Malefactors
spells.effectSummary: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in a shimmering ring of illusory mirrors that follows it as it moves, even when the creature moves outside the range of the spell.

spells.name: Mirror's Misfortune
spells.effectSummary: You split into your real self and a mirrored version of yourself that curses would-be attackers with misfortune on their next attacks.

spells.name: Mislead
spells.effectSummary: You turn yourself Invisible and create an illusory duplicate of yourself.

spells.name: Missed Cue
spells.effectSummary: You make the spell's target believe they had something incredibly important to say but forgot to say it, and now they've missed their opportunity.

spells.name: Mist
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a cloud of mist.

spells.name: Misty Memory
spells.targets: 1 body of water of at least 5 square feet
spells.effectSummary: Some say water holds memories or impressions of the past, and you can raise those memories to the surface to glimpse recent events.

spells.name: Moment of Renewal
spells.effectSummary: The targets experience a day's worth of recovery in an instant.

spells.name: Momentary Recovery
spells.effectSummary: You instantly teleport yourself and any items you're wearing or holding from your current space to a clear space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Monstrosity Form
spells.effectSummary: You transform into the shape of a legendary monster, assuming a Huge battle form.

spells.name: Moon Frenzy
spells.effectSummary: A feral aspect overcomes the targets, filling them with strength and ferocity.

spells.name: Moonbeam
spells.effectSummary: You shine a ray of moonlight.

spells.name: Moonburst
spells.effectSummary: A powerful globe of chilling moonlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 cold damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional (@item.rank+1)d10 vitality damage to undead creatures.

spells.name: Moonlight Bridge
spells.effectSummary: You summon a bridge of radiant, shimmering moonlight.

spells.name: Moonlight Ray
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a holy beam of freezing moonlight.

spells.name: Morass of Ages
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in temporal eddies that draw out time for those around you, making every step feel like an eternity endured.

spells.name: Mosquito Blight
spells.effectSummary: You infest the area with tenacious, biting insects that disease and drain life from creatures in the area.

spells.name: Mother's Blessing
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to purify and stabilize the life inside of Ulgrem-Axaan's last remaining clutch of eggs.

spells.name: Moth's Supper
spells.effectSummary: You sigh, and your breath transforms into delicate, black-winged butterflies and huge death's-head hawkmoths.

spells.name: Mountain Resilience
spells.effectSummary: The target's skin hardens like the stone of a mountain face.

spells.name: Movanic Glimmer
spells.duration: until you next perform your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You give the target animal a glimmer of awareness, not truly awakening it but allowing it to better understand its surroundings.

spells.name: Mud Pit
spells.effectSummary: Thick, clinging mud covers the ground, 1 foot deep.

spells.name: Murderous Vine
spells.targets: 1 creature adjacent to a flat surface
spells.effectSummary: You summon a slithering, thorny vine that attempts to constrict and crush a foe against a wall or other surface.

spells.name: Murmuration
spells.effectSummary: The target feels the brush of feathers against its skin and hears screeches in its ears, warning it to keep away from a creature you designate that's within 30 feet of you when you Cast this Spell ...

spells.name: Mushroom Patch
spells.effectSummary: You cause mushrooms to sprout in the area.

spells.name: Musical Accompaniment
spells.effectSummary: You're surrounded by orchestral music that shifts and changes to match your behavior.

spells.name: Musical Shift
spells.effectSummary: With a quick series of wrist flicks, music fills the air.

spells.name: Mutilate
spells.effectSummary: You cut your own body in a ritualistic manner, causing similar damage to a creature in your line of sight.

spells.name: Mycological Malady
spells.effectSummary: You infect your target with fungal spores to hasten the cycle of decay.

spells.name: Mystic Armor
spells.effectSummary: You ward yourself with shimmering magical energy, gaining a +1 item bonus to AC and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5.

spells.name: Mystic Beacon
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: The next damaging or healing spell the target casts before the start of your next turn deals damage or restores Hit Points as if the spell were heightened 1 rank higher than its actual rank.

spells.name: Mystic Carriage
spells.duration: 1 week or until the named destination is reached, whichever comes first
spells.effectSummary: This ritual allows you and the other casters to conjure a magical carriage that transports you to a destination of your choice.

spells.name: Nature Incarnate
spells.effectSummary: The primal power of the world flows through you.

spells.name: Nature's Bounty
spells.effectSummary: A palm-sized raw fruit or vegetable of your choice appears in your open hand.

spells.name: Nature's Enmity
spells.effectSummary: Animals, plants, and fungi in the area turn against the targets.

spells.name: Nature's Pathway
spells.effectSummary: You step into a living tree with a trunk big enough for you to fit inside it and instantly teleport to any tree within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large trunk.

spells.name: Nature's Reprisal
spells.targets: all squares on the ground that contain plants in an 80-foot burst
spells.effectSummary: The plant life within the area begins to writhe and lash out against your enemies as you call upon nature to impede your foes.

spells.name: Necromancer's Generosity
spells.effectSummary: You channel void energy through your magical connection to your undead minion to strengthen the creature.

spells.name: Necrotic Radiation
spells.effectSummary: You imbue the touched object or space with slow-acting necrotic radiation.

spells.name: Necrotize
spells.effectSummary: You necrotize part of a creature's body, harming it and debilitating it as its body putrefies, mimicking the natural process of decay.

spells.name: Needle Darts
spells.effectSummary: You shape three needles out of a piece of metal in your possession and send them flying in a tight group toward one target.

spells.name: Needle of Vengeance
spells.effectSummary: A long, jagged needle jabs into the target foe's psyche whenever it tries to attack a creature your patron holds in special regard.

spells.name: Negate Aroma
spells.effectSummary: The target loses its odor, preventing creatures from passively noticing its presence via smell alone, even if the creatures have precise or imprecise scent.

spells.name: Nettleskin
spells.effectSummary: Thorns sprout from your body; they pass through and don't damage any clothing or armor you wear.

spells.name: Never Mind
spells.effectSummary: You drastically reduce the target's mental faculties.

spells.name: Nightmare
spells.effectSummary: You send disturbing nightmares to your target.

spells.name: Noise Blast
spells.effectSummary: A cacophonous noise blasts out, dealing 2d10 sonic damage.

spells.name: Nothing Up My Sleeve
spells.effectSummary: You create an extradimensional space within each of your sleeves.

spells.name: Noxious Metals
spells.effectSummary: This spell forces toxic metal to coalesce on the skin or surface of all living creatures in the area, dealing 4d6 poison damage with a basic Fortitude save.

spells.name: Noxious Vapors
spells.effectSummary: You emit a cloud of toxic smoke that temporarily obscures you from sight.

spells.name: Nudge Fate
spells.effectSummary: The barest spin of your patron's spool is enough to alter fate.

spells.name: Nudge the Odds
spells.effectSummary: You bestow yourself supernaturally good luck at cards, dice, and other games of chance.

spells.name: Nullify
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A foe within range casts a 9th-rank or lower spell.

spells.name: Nymph's Grace
spells.effectSummary: Your apparition manifests as a mask of unearthly beauty that bewilders your enemies.

spells.name: Nymph's Token
spells.effectSummary: You grant an ally a token of favor.

spells.name: Oaken Resilience
spells.effectSummary: The target's skin becomes tough, with a consistency like bark or wood.

spells.name: Oathkeeper's Insignia
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You make a promise or deal.

spells.name: Object Memory
spells.effectSummary: By touching an object, you draw forth the experience of those who created and used it.

spells.name: Object Reading
spells.effectSummary: You place a hand on an object to learn a piece of information about an emotional event that occurred involving the object within the past week, determined by the GM.

spells.name: Oblivious Expulsion
spells.effectSummary: Severing ties with a member of a cult courts danger and threatens to undermine the secrecy of the group, whether that secrecy protects its worshippers or enables them to operate in the shadows.

spells.name: Ocean's Roar
spells.targets: body of water no larger than a 7-mile radius area
spells.effectSummary: You invoke consciousness in a large body of water, such as a coastline, lake, or lagoon.

spells.name: Ocular Overload
spells.effectSummary: Just as a creature is about to attack you, you assault them with jarring illusions, completely surrounding their eyes with blinding flashes of motion and color.

spells.name: Ode to Ouroboros
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature's dying condition would reach the value at which they would die.

spells.name: Oil-Slicked Walls
spells.targets: the outer walls of a settlement
spells.effectSummary: The outer walls are a city's first defense against invaders, and you want to make certain no attackers can climb over them.

spells.name: Omnidirectional Scan
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You quickly view your surroundings from a variety of angles, your senses constructing an overall mental picture.

spells.name: One with Plants
spells.effectSummary: You can either transform into a plant or merge with plant matter.

spells.name: One with Stone
spells.effectSummary: You can either transform into a stone or merge with stone.

spells.name: One with the Land
spells.effectSummary: You merge with an adjacent natural feature with enough volume to fit you and your worn and held possessions, such as the ground or a large tree.

spells.name: Oneiric Mire
spells.effectSummary: You shroud an area in illusory dreamstuff, making the ground look and feel like a deep mire or quicksand.

spells.name: Ooze Form
spells.effectSummary: You invoke all things that seep and ooze, your body dissolving into a thick slurry and then reconstituting itself into a Medium ooze battle form.

spells.name: Orb of Twisting Fate
spells.effectSummary: The glass orb of an omen dragon erupts from your target's forehead, overwhelming their mind with alternative options.

spells.name: Ordained Purpose
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the authority of cosmic forces of order, overwhelming creatures with remorse and agony for acting outside of their station and purpose.

spells.name: Organsight
spells.targets: 1 living or undead creature that has organs
spells.effectSummary: You see the target as though it's dissected and arrayed before you.

spells.name: Osseous Cage
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a prison made of bone.

spells.name: Outcast's Curse
spells.effectSummary: You afflict the target with a curse that makes its presence abrasive and off-putting.

spells.name: Over the Coals
spells.effectSummary: You accuse the target of breaking its word to you and invoke the wrath of your patron to claim what's due, demanding the target pay you in currency, fulfill an order, or stand down.

spells.name: Overflowing Sorrow
spells.effectSummary: Sadness flows out of you into nearby creatures, blotting out any other thoughts they had.

spells.name: Overselling Flourish
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature damages you.

spells.name: Overstuff
spells.effectSummary: Huge amounts of food and drink fill the target.

spells.name: Overwhelming Memory
spells.effectSummary: You cause the target to recall a specific type of memory you choose from the list below, bringing it to the forefront of their mind with perfect clarity.

spells.name: Overwhelming Presence
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself with supernatural splendor, appearing to be a god or similarly majestic being, with an appearance, regalia, and iconography of your choice.

spells.name: Owb Pact
spells.effectSummary: You call upon an owb to assist you in a goal.

spells.name: Pack Attack
spells.effectSummary: You and one other target gain an uncanny coordination that helps you take down foes.

spells.name: Pack Breaker
spells.effectSummary: You can deceive creatures by changing their perception of their allies' behavior.

spells.name: Pact Broker
spells.effectSummary: You offer to broker a pact of peace.

spells.name: Pain of Ages
spells.effectSummary: You sense a spiritual resonance of deep anguish in the earth beneath your feet, the walls surrounding you, or the fragments of souls left behind in a place of calamity.

spells.name: Painful Vibrations
spells.effectSummary: You send powerful sound waves through an opponent's body, vibrating its bones and internal organs painfully.

spells.name: Painted Scout
spells.targets: a cave wall or other stone surface
spells.effectSummary: You press your hand to the stone, causing hand-drawn scouts to spread out from your fingers.

spells.name: Paralyze
spells.effectSummary: You block the target's motor impulses before they can leave its mind, threatening to freeze the target in place.

spells.name: Paranoia
spells.effectSummary: You cause the target to see all other creatures as dire threats.

spells.name: Parch
spells.effectSummary: Dry winds dehydrate a creature.

spells.name: Part the Mists to Paradise
spells.targets: you and up to 6 willing creatures
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a pathway to paradise, visible only to you and your allies through a dense cloud of magical mist.

spells.name: Path of Least Resistance
spells.effectSummary: You trace several possible routes, quickly resetting the timeline until you find the safest one.

spells.name: Patron's Puppet
spells.effectSummary: Trigger Your turn begins.

spells.name: Pave Ground
spells.effectSummary: You even out the ground and push aside low obstacles.

spells.name: Peaceful Bubble
spells.effectSummary: An opaque shell of drifting, iridescent runes covers the area, creating a bubble.

spells.name: Peaceful Rest
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: The targeted corpse doesn't decay, nor can it be transformed into an undead.

spells.name: Penumbral Disguise
spells.effectSummary: You wrap the target in shadows, granting it a +1 status bonus to Stealth checks to Hide while in dim light or darkness.

spells.name: Penumbral Shroud
spells.effectSummary: You envelop the target in a shroud of shadow.

spells.name: Perceive the Threads of Fate
spells.effectSummary: You open your mind to the grand design of existence, enabling you to view the threads of fate in all their complex, tangled glory.

spells.name: Percussive Impact
spells.effectSummary: You lob a compressed ball of sound at a foe.

spells.name: Perfect Strike
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You miss a Strike with an unarmed attack.

spells.name: Perfected Body
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You fail or critically fail a saving throw against an effect that has the morph, poison, or polymorph trait, or that would make you Clumsy, Doomed, Enfeebled, Petrified, or Sickened.

spells.name: Perfected Mind
spells.effectSummary: You meditate upon perfection to remove all distractions from your mind.

spells.name: Perfection of Essence
spells.effectSummary: Many have pursued alchemical means to immortality, and most haven't survived the attempt.

spells.name: Pernicious Poltergeist
spells.effectSummary: You create an echo of a powerful poltergeist, temporarily anchoring it to the area to terrorize and harm any opponents foolish enough to remain in the area.

spells.name: Perseis's Precautions
spells.effectSummary: Leaving nothing to chance, you weave divinatory precautions against an ambush, alerting the target to danger.

spells.name: Persistent Servant
spells.effectSummary: You call forth an unseen servant and task it to perform a specific chore repeatedly.

spells.name: Personal Blizzard
spells.effectSummary: Your patron's breath becomes blizzard of obscuring, scouring ice that follows your target.

spells.name: Personal Ocean
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a bubble-like shroud of seawater that fills your space completely and moves with you.

spells.name: Personal Rain Cloud
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a 5-foot-wide rain cloud that follows the target wherever it goes.

spells.name: Personal Runewell
spells.effectSummary: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Pest Form
spells.effectSummary: You transform into the battle form of a Tiny animal, such as a cat, insect, lizard, or rat.

spells.name: Pest Swarm
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Sometimes the most common irritations can band together and become threats to your enemies.

spells.name: Pet Cache
spells.targets: 1 willing creature that is your companion
spells.effectSummary: You open your cloak or create a gap with your hands, drawing the target into a pocket dimension just large enough for its basic comfort.

spells.name: Petal Storm
spells.effectSummary: You bring forth a cloud of razor-sharp flower petals that thrash violently in the wind.

spells.name: Petrify
spells.effectSummary: The target's body slowly turns into a stone statue.

spells.name: Phantasmagoria
spells.effectSummary: You fill the targets' minds with endless images, like countless dreams and lives colliding with each other.

spells.name: Phantasmal Calamity
spells.effectSummary: A vision of apocalyptic destruction fills the mind of each creature in the area.

spells.name: Phantasmal Custodians
spells.effectSummary: Area 100 feet × 100 feet, up to 20 feet high

spells.name: Phantasmal Killer
spells.effectSummary: You create a phantasmal image of the most fearsome creature imaginable to the target.

spells.name: Phantasmal Minion
spells.effectSummary: You summon a Phantasmal Minion.

spells.name: Phantasmal Protagonist
spells.effectSummary: You create a phantasmal incarnation of a significant character from a novel, historical work, or religious parable.

spells.name: Phantasmal Treasure
spells.effectSummary: A phantasmal image of the most precious thing imaginable to the target appears in a location of your choice within the spell's range.

spells.name: Phantom Crowd
spells.effectSummary: A tightly packed crowd of humanoids appropriate to the area appear, facing you and agreeing loudly with anything you say.

spells.name: Phantom Orchestra
spells.effectSummary: You orchestrate an invisible ensemble of lost sounds captured inside errant breezes across the Plane of Air, and you can direct this symphony to attack foes within range.

spells.name: Phantom Pain
spells.effectSummary: Illusory pain wracks the target, dealing 2d4 mental damage and (@item.level)d4 persistent,mental damage.

spells.name: Phantom Prison
spells.effectSummary: You completely surround a Large or smaller creature in immobile illusory walls, trapping it inside a false prison it can't escape.

spells.name: Phantom Ship
spells.targets: 1 ship no more than 175 feet long
spells.effectSummary: You create a link between a ship and an undead member of its crew to temporarily make the ship, and its passengers and crew, as incorporeal as ghosts.

spells.name: Phase Bolt
spells.effectSummary: You point your finger and project a bolt of magical energy that stutters in and out of phase until it reaches the target.

spells.name: Phase Familiar
spells.effectSummary: Trigger Your familiar would take damage.

spells.name: Phoenix Ward
spells.effectSummary: You raise a fiery shield around yourself, gaining resistance 10 to fire.

spells.name: Physical Boost
spells.duration: until the end of the target's next turn
spells.effectSummary: You temporarily improve the target's physique.

spells.name: Pied Piping
spells.effectSummary: Your performance enraptures listeners, compelling them to follow you.

spells.name: Pillar of Water
spells.effectSummary: You create a large, self-contained cylinder of still, clear fresh water.

spells.name: Pillars of Sand
spells.effectSummary: You raise one or more pillars of solid sand from the earth.

spells.name: Pinpoint
spells.effectSummary: You learn the name of the target's exact location (including the building, community, and country) and plane of existence.

spells.name: Plague Shot
spells.targets: 10 pieces of siege weapon ammunition, such as a ballista bolt or catapult stone
spells.effectSummary: You imbue several pieces of siege weapon ammunition with an infectious disease that can bring an opposing force low over time.

spells.name: Planar Displacement
spells.effectSummary: You draw a ritual circle, and when the ritual is complete, you shift all creatures in the area to a different plane of existence.

spells.name: Planar Palace
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You grow an extradimensional demiplane consisting of a spacious dwelling with a single entrance.

spells.name: Planar Seal
spells.effectSummary: You create a visible magical barrier that attempts to counteract teleportation effects and planar travel into or out of the area, including items that allow access to extradimensional spaces.

spells.name: Planar Servitor
spells.effectSummary: You call upon a deity (or other divine power) to grant you aid in the form of a divine servitor of your deity's choice, with a level no greater than double the ritual's spell rank.

spells.name: Planar Tether
spells.effectSummary: You stitch the target to its current plane.

spells.name: Plant Form
spells.effectSummary: Taking inspiration from verdant creatures, you transform into a Large plant battle form.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.effectSummary: Area 1/2-mile-radius circle centered on you

spells.name: Pocket Library
spells.effectSummary: Like Vil Seral, you collect information from all around you and store it in book form in an extradimensional library.

spells.name: Polar Ray
spells.effectSummary: You fire a blue-white ray of freezing air and sleet that deals 10d8 cold damage.

spells.name: Pollen Pods
spells.effectSummary: Area four unoccupied 5-foot squares, each of which is at least 20 feet apart

spells.name: Poltergeist's Fury
spells.effectSummary: Your fury spills over in a telekinetic storm of terrifying proportions.

spells.name: Portrait of Spite
spells.effectSummary: Using the blood, you compose a portrait of the target in perfect health.

spells.name: Portrait of the Artist
spells.effectSummary: You change your appearance to look like a well-known artist talented at a particular craft or performance, such as a painter, singer, or orator, with the effects of illusory disguise.

spells.name: Positive Attunement
spells.effectSummary: You attune a creature to the Forge of Creation, connecting its life force without fully transporting it.

spells.name: Possession
spells.effectSummary: You send your mind and soul into the target's body, attempting to take control.

spells.name: Power of the Beasts
spells.effectSummary: To simply kill the magical beasts who populate Tian Xia is needless and wasteful.

spells.name: Power Word Blind
spells.effectSummary: You utter an arcane word of power that can make the target Blinded upon hearing it.

spells.name: Power Word Kill
spells.effectSummary: You utter the most powerful arcane word of power.

spells.name: Power Word Stun
spells.effectSummary: You stun the target with an arcane word of power.

spells.name: Powerful Inhalation
spells.effectSummary: You rapidly draw the air from your surroundings, hoarding it for yourself.

spells.name: Practice Makes Perfect
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or an ally within range fails a skill check for a skill in which you or they are trained.

spells.name: Precious Gleam
spells.targets: 1 weapon that is unattended or wielded by a willing creature.
spells.duration: until the beginning of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You temporarily enhance a weapon, replacing it with finer materials.

spells.name: Precious Metals
spells.targets: 1 metal shield or weapon, 1 suit of metal armor, or up to 1 Bulk of metal material (such as coins or metal-tipped ammunition)
spells.effectSummary: Your deity blesses base metals to transform them into precious materials.

spells.name: Pressure Zone
spells.effectSummary: Air pressure drops precipitously, causing pain and debilitation in creatures' inner ears and joints.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.effectSummary: The simplest magic does your bidding.

spells.name: Primal Call
spells.targets: 1 animal, beast, fey, fungus, or plant
spells.effectSummary: This functions as Planar Servitor except you craft a faerie circle and call an animal, beast, fey, fungus, or plant from within 100 miles.

spells.name: Primal Chorus
spells.effectSummary: You let loose a primal howl that incites animals and beasts to join in the chorus.

spells.name: Primal Herd
spells.targets: you and up to 5 willing targets
spells.effectSummary: Summoning the power of the natural world, you transform the targets into a herd of mammoths, and they each assume a Huge battle form.

spells.name: Primal Phenomenon
spells.effectSummary: You request a direct intercession from the natural world.

spells.name: Primal Summons
spells.effectSummary: You enhance a summoned creature with the power of the elements.

spells.name: Prismatic Armor
spells.effectSummary: You wrap the target in armor made of multicolored light.

spells.name: Prismatic Shield
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Shield-sized shards of multicolored light manifest in the air around you, each rotating quickly to intercept attacks.

spells.name: Prismatic Sphere
spells.effectSummary: You create a seven-layered sphere to protect an area.

spells.name: Prismatic Spray
spells.effectSummary: A spray of rainbow light beams cascades from your open hand.

spells.name: Prismatic Wall
spells.effectSummary: You create an opaque wall of shimmering, multicolored light.

spells.name: Procyal Philosophy
spells.effectSummary: The racoon-like visage of a sagacious procyal appears, dispensing helpful advice.

spells.name: Project Image
spells.effectSummary: You project an illusory image of yourself.

spells.name: Proliferating Eyes
spells.effectSummary: You implant an Invisible, magical eye sensor on the target's body.

spells.name: Prophet's Luck
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or a creature within range attempts a saving throw against an obvious threat.

spells.name: Propulsive Breeze
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally in range Strides or Leaps.

spells.name: Protect Companion
spells.targets: your eidolon, or a creature with the minion trait under your control
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You extend your aura, as a magical shield that protects your eidolon or minion.

spells.name: Protection
spells.effectSummary: You ward a creature against harm.

spells.name: Protective Wards
spells.effectSummary: You expand a ring of glyphs that shields your allies.

spells.name: Protector Tree
spells.effectSummary: A Medium tree suddenly grows in an unoccupied square within range.

spells.name: Protector's Sacrifice
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally within 30 feet takes damage.

spells.name: Protector's Sphere
spells.effectSummary: A protective aura emanates out from you, safeguarding you and your allies.

spells.name: Prying Survey
spells.effectSummary: You create eight invisible, floating eyes, each about 3 inches in diameter, that scan the area around you, transmitting rough impressions of the environment.

spells.name: Puff of Poison
spells.effectSummary: You exhale a shimmering cloud of toxic breath at an enemy's face.

spells.name: Pulse of Civilization
spells.effectSummary: You tap into the zeitgeist of any settlements in range.

spells.name: Pulverizing Cascade
spells.effectSummary: You raise a pair of towering waves and slam them into each other, crushing creatures caught between them.

spells.name: Pulverizing Wake
spells.effectSummary: Imitating raptorial creatures, you attack with such speed it drives a sonic shockwave.

spells.name: Pummeling Rubble
spells.effectSummary: A spray of heavy rocks flies through the air in front of you.

spells.name: Punishing Winds
spells.effectSummary: Area (continued) 30-foot-radius, 100-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Purging Toxins
spells.effectSummary: In the right dose, a scourge can become a cure.

spells.name: Purify Soul Path
spells.effectSummary: You delve inward, spending extensive time contemplating the purity of your own soul and the actions of your past.

spells.name: Purify Tanglebriar
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the primal presence of the Fierani Forest and the elven legacy of Kyonin in an attempt to purify a portion of the blighted realm of Tanglebriar.

spells.name: Purifying Icicle
spells.effectSummary: You evoke life essence into the form of water and freeze it, then launch the icicle at a foe.

spells.name: Purifying Veil
spells.effectSummary: Drawing on the purifying powers of water, you call forth a veil of fine water droplets suffused with holy energy.

spells.name: Purple Worm Sting
spells.effectSummary: You replicate the attack of a deadly purple worm.

spells.name: Pushing Gust
spells.effectSummary: Giving the air a push, you buffet the target with a powerful gust of wind; it must attempt a Fortitude save.

spells.name: Putrefy Food and Drink
spells.targets: 1 cubic foot of clean food or water
spells.effectSummary: You cause otherwise edible food to rot and spoil instantly, and water and other liquids to become brackish and undrinkable.

spells.name: Pyrefowl Rebuke
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within 10 feet of you Strikes and deals damage to you.

spells.name: Pyrotechnics
spells.effectSummary: You turn a fire into either a burst of blinding fireworks or a thick cloud of choking smoke, chosen when you Cast the Spell.

spells.name: Qi Blast
spells.effectSummary: You unleash your qi as a powerful blast that deals 2d6 force damage.

spells.name: Qi Form
spells.effectSummary: Drawing from deep wells of spiritual power, you take on a special qi form.

spells.name: Qi Rush
spells.effectSummary: Accelerated by your qi, you move with such speed you become a blur.

spells.name: Quandary
spells.effectSummary: You transport the target into an extraplanar puzzle room of mysterious origin, locking them there.

spells.name: Quench

spells.name: Quick Sort

spells.effectSummary: You magically sort a group of objects into neat stacks or piles.

spells.name: Quicken Time
spells.effectSummary: You speed up the time stream in an area, stretching and pulling it until time flows swift and wild.

spells.name: Radiant Beam

spells.name: Radiant Field

spells.name: Radiant Globe
spells.effectSummary: You create a dome of brilliant light that destroys projectiles attempting to pass through it.

spells.name: Radiant Heart of Devotion
spells.effectSummary: You speak a fervent prayer for the heavens to assist you and your righteous allies.

spells.name: Raga of Remembrance
spells.effectSummary: You scribe occult symbols on unblighted Vudran ground, laying the ceramics within them to create a ritual space.

spells.name: Rainbow Fumarole
spells.effectSummary: Area 20-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Rainbow's End
spells.effectSummary: You reach upward to wrest down a rainbow and harness its power to connect this world to the heavens.

spells.name: Raise Dead
spells.targets: 1 dead creature of 13th level or lower
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to call forth the dead creature's soul, requiring the creature's body to be present and relatively intact.

spells.name: Raise Runelord
spells.targets: 1 dead runelord who is not already active as a risen runelord
spells.effectSummary: By drawing upon fragments of physical remains or treasured objects of a dead runelord and upon remnant energies of each runelord that live on after their deaths in the Dreamlands, this ritual creat...

spells.name: Rally Point
spells.effectSummary: You mark the area touched as a rally point.

spells.name: Rallying Anthem
spells.effectSummary: Your song moves allies to protect themselves more effectively.

spells.name: Rallying Banner
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusory banner representing a revolution, social movement, or organization such as the Firebrands.

spells.name: Ranage's Circle
spells.effectSummary: Many stories tell of a clearing deep in the Mwangi jungle, surrounded by ancient cypress trees.

spells.name: Ranger's Bramble
spells.effectSummary: You cause plants in the area to entangle your foes, with the effects of Entangling Flora.

spells.name: Ransack the Night
spells.effectSummary: When Fumeiyoshi was punished by the Celestial Court for deicide and fratricide, the rat who would become Lao Shu Po robbed the cangue-bound Fumeiyoshi of a sizable chunk of his shadow.

spells.name: Rapid Adaptation
spells.effectSummary: You flood the target with energy from the terrain around it, compressing centuries of evolution into a single moment.

spells.name: Rapid Retreat
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You take damage from an attack or spell.

spells.name: Ravening Maw
spells.effectSummary: You evoke Zevgavizeb's unceasing hunger and inflict it upon your target.

spells.name: Ravenous Darkness
spells.effectSummary: You create a shroud of magical darkness that feeds on those inside it.

spells.name: Ravenous Portal

spells.effectSummary: You place a ward upon the door that triggers when a creature attempts to open, unlock, or destroy the door.

spells.name: Ravenous Reanimation
spells.effectSummary: You destroy the gathered treasures with your breath weapon or other powerful magic, then invoke necromantic energies before you feed upon the charred and melted remains.

spells.name: Ray of Corruption
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a sickly gray beam of toxic spores at your target.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.effectSummary: You blast an icy ray.

spells.name: Read Aura
spells.effectSummary: You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras.

spells.name: Read Fate

spells.name: Read Omens
spells.effectSummary: You peek into the future.

spells.name: Read the Air
spells.effectSummary: You take a deep breath as you survey a social situation, showing courtesy to all around you as your intuition swiftly picks up clues about social contexts and unspoken assumptions of behavior.

spells.name: Reaper's Lantern
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a ghostly lantern that guides the living toward death and the undead toward true death.

spells.name: Rebounding Barrier
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You are hit by a physical Strike.

spells.name: Rebuke Death

spells.effectSummary: You snatch creatures from the jaws of death, restoring them without the straing of a typical close call.

spells.name: Recall Legacy
spells.duration: Until the target's next daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You establish a mental link with the target, focusing on a piece of knowledge important to their culture, family (by birth or choice), or home settlement.

spells.name: Recall Past Life
spells.targets: the secondary caster who doesn't perform the Crafting check
spells.effectSummary: You and the secondary casters spend 2 days drawing sigils on one another.

spells.name: Reclined Apport
spells.targets: 1 unattended object of light Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: Walking over to an item to pick it up is so much effort.

spells.name: Redact
spells.targets: unattended written materials of up to 1 Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: You strike mention of a specific name from one or more documents.

spells.name: Redistribute Potential
spells.effectSummary: Area two adjacent 5-foot squares

spells.name: Reed Whistle
spells.effectSummary: You enchant a blade of grass that you can easily hold in your mouth without inhibiting your speech or other actions.

spells.name: Reflected Beauty
spells.effectSummary: When you cast reflected beauty, choose a willing creature that's the same size as you and that you can see within 30 feet.

spells.name: Reflective Scales
spells.effectSummary: You grow a set of colored, glowing scales or scaled armor that stores energy before releasing it in a final burst.

spells.name: Regale the Lost Ones
spells.targets: a settlement with a level equal to or lower than twice the ritual's level
spells.effectSummary: Autumn's shorter days herald an increase in hauntings, which only intensify during winter's cold, dark nights.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.effectSummary: An infusion of vital energy grants a creature continuous healing.

spells.name: Reincarnate
spells.targets: 1 dead creature of up to 8th level
spells.effectSummary: You call forth the target's soul and attempt to incarnate it into a brand-new body.

spells.name: Reinforce Eidolon
spells.effectSummary: You focus deeply on the link between you and your eidolon and reinforce your eidolon's defenses.

spells.name: Reinforced Rations
spells.targets: all food and drink in the area
spells.effectSummary: An army marches on its stomach, and a city under siege is often cut off from its normal food supplies, so preserving comestibles is of utmost importance during a prolonged conflict.

spells.name: Rejuvenating Flames
spells.effectSummary: You create a gout of flame that both heals and burns.

spells.name: Remake
spells.effectSummary: You fully re-create an object from nothing, even if the object was destroyed.

spells.name: Remember the Lost
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the lost and forgotten, assailing your foes' minds with the memories of those who died with a grievance toward them.

spells.name: Repel Metal
spells.targets: the creature targeted by the triggering Strike
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A Strike with a metallic weapon or projectile would hit you or an ally within range.

spells.name: Repelling Pulse
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a powerful pulse of telekinetic power, and the pulse violently hurls creatures away from you.

spells.name: Replicate

spells.effectSummary: You create an illusory magical double that physically looks and behaves very similarly to the target.

spells.name: Repulsion

spells.name: Resist Energy

spells.name: Resplendent Mansion

spells.name: Rest Eternal
spells.effectSummary: You call upon gods, spirits, and stranger beings to bar a creature's spirit from ever returning.

spells.name: Restoration

spells.name: Restorative Moment
spells.effectSummary: Your patron weaves the threads of time around the target, giving them some of the benefits of a day's passage.

spells.name: Restore Ground
spells.effectSummary: You sense that this place yearns to throw off the shackles of civilization.

spells.name: Restyle

spells.effectSummary: You permanently change the appearance of one piece of clothing currently worn by you or an ally to better fit your aesthetic sensibilities.

spells.name: Resurrect
spells.targets: 1 dead creature of up to 10th level
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to call forth the target's soul and return it to its body.

spells.name: Retreat Among the Rains
spells.effectSummary: Ganhil developed this ritual to emulate the epiphanies and flowing mental states he experienced during 4718's Challenge of Sky and Heaven: intense focus, emotional acceptance, dilated perceptions, ...

spells.name: Retributive Pain
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature in range damages you.

spells.name: Retrocognition
spells.effectSummary: Opening your mind to mental echoes, you gain impressions from past events that occurred in your current location.

spells.name: Return Beacon

spells.name: Return the Favor

spells.name: Return To Essence
spells.targets: one magically sealed or warded doorway or chest

spells.name: Revealing Light
spells.effectSummary: A wave of magical light washes over the area.

spells.name: Revel in Retribution

spells.name: Reverse Gravity

spells.name: Revival
spells.targets: dead creatures and living creatures of your choice within range

spells.name: Rewinding Step

spells.name: Rewrite Memory

spells.name: Rewrite Possibility

spells.name: Rigid Form

spells.name: Rime Slick

spells.name: Ring of Truth

spells.name: Rising Surf

spells.name: Rite of Repatriation

spells.name: Ritual Obstruction

spells.name: River Carving Mountains

spells.name: Root Reading

spells.name: Rope Trick

spells.name: Rousing Splash

spells.name: Rune of Observation

spells.name: Runic Body

spells.name: Safe Passage

spells.name: Safeguard Secret

spells.name: Sanctuary

spells.name: Sand Form

spells.name: Sanguine Mist

spells.name: Savor the Sting

spells.name: Sawtooth Terrain

spells.name: Scatter Scree

spells.name: Scholarly Recollection

spells.name: Scintillating Safeguard

spells.effectSummary: Trigger An effect would deal physical or energy damage to you or a creature in range.

spells.name: Scorching Blast

spells.name: Scouring Pulse
spells.effectSummary: Area 10-foot radius, 60-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Scouring Sand
spells.effectSummary: You blast the area with grit that scours away soil and gets into creatures' eyes.

spells.name: Scouting Eye

spells.name: Scramble Body

spells.name: Scrounger's Glee

spells.name: Scrying

spells.name: Scrying Ripples

spells.name: Sculpt Sound

spells.name: Sea of Thought
spells.effectSummary: You cover the area in a sloshing torrent of semi-solidified thought, roughly ankle high.

spells.name: Sea Surge

spells.name: Seal Fate

spells.name: Seashell of Stolen Sound
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within range begins to make a sound.

spells.name: Secret Chest
spells.targets: 1 container and its contents, totaling 10 Bulk or less
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations

spells.name: Secret Page
spells.targets: 1 page up to 3 square feet in size
spells.effectSummary: You change the target's text to different text entirely.

spells.name: Secure Siege Weapons
spells.targets: siege weapons operated by allied crews

spells.name: See the Unseen
spells.effectSummary: Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds Invisible creatures and spirits.

spells.name: Seed of Mercy

spells.name: Seize Identity
spells.effectSummary: With a gleeful cackle, you seize an individual's voice and swallow it.

spells.name: Seize Soul
spells.targets: 1 creature that died within the last minute
spells.effectSummary: You trap the target's soul in the item before the soul can pass on to the afterlife.

spells.name: Sending
spells.effectSummary: You send the creature a mental message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

spells.name: Sepulchral Mask

spells.name: Serrate

spells.name: Shadow Army
spells.effectSummary: You create dozens of semi-real copies of yourself that swarm across the battlefield and fight your enemies.

spells.name: Shadow Blast
spells.effectSummary: Area varies

spells.name: Shadow Double
spells.effectSummary: You create an illusory duplicate of the target creature by drawing shadowy material from the Netherworld and sculpting it into a semi-solid form.

spells.name: Shadow Illusion
spells.effectSummary: You create a shadowy illusion of a creature or a stationary object, but the illusion can exist only in an area of dim light or darkness.

spells.name: Shadow Jump
spells.effectSummary: You instantly transport yourself from one shadow to another.

spells.name: Shadow Projectile
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally within 20 feet of you makes a ranged attack roll.

spells.name: Shadow Raid
spells.effectSummary: You spin illusions of flying shadows throughout the area.

spells.name: Shadow Siphon
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A spell or magical effect deals damage.

spells.name: Shadow Spy
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You mix blood, soil, and shadow together to form a half-real homunculus in the shape of a crow, sparrow, or other bird.

spells.name: Shadow Zombie
spells.effectSummary: You cast a shadow over the target zombie, briefly turning it into shadowy vapor and controlling its movement.

spells.name: Shadow's Web
spells.effectSummary: Grasping darkness surges from you, dealing 14d4 void damage.

spells.name: Shaken Confidence
spells.targets: An enemy that critically failed an attack roll, Perception check, or skill check
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An enemy within 30 feet of you critically fails an attack roll, Perception check, or skill check.

spells.name: Shall not Falter, Shall not Rout

spells.name: Shambling Horror

spells.effectSummary: You reanimate the corpse of a fallen creature as an undead minion under your control.

spells.name: Shape Stone
spells.targets: cube of stone 10 feet across or smaller
spells.effectSummary: You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice.

spells.name: Shape Wood
spells.targets: an unworked piece of wood up to 20 cubic feet in volume
spells.effectSummary: You shape the wood into a rough shape of your choice.

spells.name: Share Burden
