spells.name: Share Life
spells.effectSummary: You forge a temporary link between the target's life essence and your own.

spells.name: Share Lore
spells.effectSummary: You share your knowledge with the touched creatures.

spells.name: Share Vision
spells.effectSummary: Your patron temporarily links your vision with that of another, causing both of you to be able to see through each other's eyes.

spells.name: Shared Invisibility
spells.targets: you and up to 5 willing creatures
spells.effectSummary: You and all targets are Invisible except to each other as long as the targets remain within the emanation.

spells.name: Shared Nightmare
spells.effectSummary: Merging minds with the target, you swap distressing visions.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.effectSummary: A high-frequency sonic attack shatters a nearby object.

spells.name: Shatter Mind
spells.effectSummary: You telepathically assail the minds of your foes.

spells.name: Shattering Gem
spells.effectSummary: A large gem floats around the target in an erratic pattern.

spells.name: Sheltering Wings
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally moves through a square within 15 feet of you or uses an action that has the move trait.

spells.name: Shepherd of Souls
spells.effectSummary: You stay the hand of fate for one not yet destined to die, sacrificing some of your own vitality to heal them.

spells.name: Shield
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You raise a magical shield of force.

spells.name: Shielded Arm
spells.effectSummary: Reinforcing veins of ore run through the target's arm, letting it ward off blows with its bare skin.

spells.name: Shielding Formation
spells.effectSummary: You conjure magical shields of force to protect your allies around you.

spells.name: Shielding Strike
spells.effectSummary: As you attack a foe, warding magic transforms your momentum into action and lifts your shield.

spells.name: Shields of the Spirit
spells.effectSummary: Requirements You are wielding a shield.

spells.name: Shift Blame
spells.targets: the target of the triggering attack or skill check
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or another creature attacks a creature or fails at a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check.

spells.name: Shifting Form
spells.effectSummary: You change your body to better suit the moment.

spells.name: Shifting Sand
spells.effectSummary: Area (continued) a horizontal earthen or sandy surface within a 20-foot burst

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.effectSummary: The target grows vines and leaves, brimming with primal energy.

spells.name: Shining Starlight Attack
spells.effectSummary: Area varies (see below)

spells.name: Shock and Awe
spells.effectSummary: You create the illusion of cannons exploding, bullets and arrows flying, and magical ballistics firing, as an overwhelming torrent of information, both visual and auditory.

spells.name: Shock to the System
spells.targets: 1 living creature or 1 corpse that died within the last round
spells.effectSummary: A dense lightning cloud descends to fill the target's space, then fires a jolt of revitalizing lightning into the target.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.effectSummary: You shroud your hands in a crackling field of lightning.

spells.name: Shockwave
spells.effectSummary: You create a wave of energy that ripples through the earth.

spells.name: Shooting Star
spells.effectSummary: You let loose a projectile that flies true and leaves the blazing trail of a meteor behind it.

spells.name: Show the Path
spells.effectSummary: You grant the target insight on things to come, guiding them toward a fate they find most fitting and encouraging them to continue this journey.

spells.name: Show the Way
spells.effectSummary: You and allies in the area gain preternatural knowledge of the path ahead, allowing you to intuit the best way forward and avoid potential obstacles, such as difficult or confusing terrain.

spells.name: Shrink
spells.effectSummary: You warp space to make a creature smaller.

spells.name: Shrink Item
spells.targets: 1 non-magical object up to 20 cubic feet in volume and up to 80 Bulk
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You shrink the target to roughly the size of a coin with negligible Bulk.

spells.name: Shrink the Span
spells.effectSummary: You move so fast you blur across planar boundaries.

spells.name: Shroud of Flame
spells.effectSummary: You encircle yourself in an aura of protective flames.

spells.name: Shroud of Night
spells.effectSummary: Your patron blankets the target's eyes in darkness.

spells.name: Shroud of the Mantis
spells.effectSummary: You wrap yourself in a crimson cloak that renders you Invisible, with the same restrictions as a 2nd-rank Invisibility spell.

spells.name: Siege Weapon's Blessing
spells.effectSummary: You trace a magic rune onto the body of a siege weapon, calling upon fate or your faith to guide the attacks your allies make with this machine.

spells.name: Sigil

spells.name: Sign of Conviction
spells.effectSummary: You conjure the religious symbol of your deity into the air above you in the same space you stand in, wielding the power of your faith to smite your foes.

spells.name: Signal Skyrocket
spells.effectSummary: With a pinch of metallic powder and gunpowder, you call forth blistering red energy that shoots straight upward into the air and explodes, unleashing a crackling boom.

spells.name: Silence
spells.effectSummary: The target makes no sound, preventing creatures from noticing it using hearing alone.

spells.name: Silver's Refrain
spells.effectSummary: The "Song of Silver" was an enchanted song used by the Silver Ravens to battle diabolic forces.

spells.name: Skeleton Army
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: With a fistful of compressed bones, you summon a legion of skeletal hulks to fight in your war, refusing to let them rest until they've given up their last inches of usefulness to your cause.

spells.name: Sky Laughs at Waves
spells.effectSummary: Requirements You're wielding a one-handed weapon in the sword group.

spells.name: Sky Signs
spells.effectSummary: You emblazon a message across the sky itself.

spells.name: Slashing Gust
spells.effectSummary: You slash your hand through the air, channeling miniature ripples of air from each finger to slice your enemy.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.effectSummary: Each creature in the area becomes drowsy, possibly nodding off.

spells.name: Sleepless Season
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to inflict a curse of sleeplessness upon individuals in the target area to weaken their resolve, possibly making it easier to conquer them.

spells.name: Sliding Blocks
spells.effectSummary: You conjure up to six 5-foot stone cubes you can gently move with a gesture.

spells.name: Slime Spit
spells.effectSummary: You spit toxic goo that coats your target's face and eyes, dealing 2d6 poison damage.

spells.name: Slither
spells.effectSummary: A mass of snakes made of shadow rise up to capture creatures in the area.

spells.name: Slough Skin
spells.effectSummary: You continually and harmlessly slough off the top layer of your skin while new skin regenerates immediately, quickly moving damaging substances away from your body.

spells.name: Slow
spells.effectSummary: You dilate the flow of time around the target, slowing its actions.

spells.name: Snake Fangs
spells.effectSummary: Your jaw unhinges as your teeth extend into wicked fangs.

spells.name: Snare Hopping
spells.effectSummary: You may not have placed your snare in the right place, but you can magically move it there.

spells.name: Snowball
spells.effectSummary: You throw a magically propelled and chilled ball of dense snow.

spells.name: Soft Landing
spells.effectSummary: You create a magical field that buoys any creature or object falling into the area, providing a harmless landing from any height.

spells.name: Solid Fog
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a bank of fog so thick it impedes movement as well as sight.

spells.name: Sonata Span
spells.effectSummary: By playing a brief tune on an instrument or in song, you cause the notes of the melody to physically manifest into a shimmering, translucent path.

spells.name: Song of Marching
spells.effectSummary: You maintain a brisk performance that keeps allies on the move.

spells.name: Song of Silver
spells.effectSummary: The majority of the Song of Silver's time needed to Cast it consists of preparations for the performance, which must take place on a stage in Kintargo.

spells.name: Song of Strength
spells.effectSummary: You bolster your allies' physical strength with a hearty exhortation.

spells.name: Song of the Fallen
spells.targets: up to 4 dead creatures or up to 4 undead creatures
spells.effectSummary: You chant a dirge or an elegy that either rouses the dead to action or reminds undead that they should lay to rest.

spells.name: Songbird's Call
spells.effectSummary: Your voice calls a storm of songbirds that whirl around you and peck at your enemies.

spells.name: Soothe
spells.effectSummary: You grace the target's mind, boosting its mental defenses and healing its wounds.

spells.name: Soothing Ballad
spells.effectSummary: You draw upon your muse to soothe your allies.

spells.name: Soothing Blossoms
spells.effectSummary: Blossoms grow from the ground in a small area, soothing away afflictions and persistent pains and harm.

spells.name: Soothing Mist
spells.targets: 1 willing living creature or 1 undead creature
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a magical mist that envelops a creature.

spells.name: Soothing Spring
spells.effectSummary: Steam wisps into the air as a stone-lined pool appears in the ground and fills with hot water that bubbles up from the earth.

spells.name: Soothing Words
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to calm the target by uttering soothing words in a calm and even tone.

spells.name: Soul Siphon
spells.effectSummary: You siphon off a portion of the target's soul to bolster your own vitality.

spells.name: Soulshelter Vessel
spells.targets: 1 willing creature and 1 non-magical stone object of 1 or 2 Bulk
spells.effectSummary: You connect the spirit of the target creature with the target object, giving their spirit a durable vessel that protects and empowers their body.

spells.name: Sound Body
spells.effectSummary: You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body.

spells.name: Sparkleskin
spells.effectSummary: You coat a creature's body in a layer of brilliantly sparkling glitter.

spells.name: Speak with Animals
spells.effectSummary: You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals.

spells.name: Speak with Plants
spells.effectSummary: You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal.

spells.name: Speak with Stones
spells.effectSummary: You can ask questions of and receive answers from natural or worked stone.

spells.name: Speaking Sky
spells.effectSummary: The air speaks to you.

spells.name: Spectral Advance
spells.effectSummary: Taking on a spiritual form, you flash across the battlefield to engage an enemy.

spells.name: Spell Immunity
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: You ward a creature against the effects of a single spell.

spells.name: Spell Riposte
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You're the target of a spell you're aware of.

spells.name: Spell Turning
spells.effectSummary: This abjuration reflects spells cast at you back at their caster.

spells.name: Spellmaster's Ward
spells.effectSummary: You create one or more glowing protective runes that revolve around you.

spells.name: Spellsurge
spells.effectSummary: Magic surges to life around you, feeding on the raw power you radiate.

spells.name: Spellwrack
spells.effectSummary: You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges.

spells.name: Spider Sting
spells.effectSummary: You magically duplicate a spider's venomous sting.

spells.name: Spike Stones
spells.effectSummary: Long, sharp spikes of solid rock thrust up from the ground in the area.

spells.name: Spinning Staff
spells.effectSummary: You spin your staff with a twirling flourish, attacking two foes and transforming the momentum into magical energy to charge for your next Spellstrike.

spells.name: Spiral of Horrors
spells.effectSummary: Shades and spirits howl and whirl around you in a display that strikes fear into the hearts of all who witness it.

spells.name: Spirit Blast
spells.effectSummary: You concentrate ethereal energy and attack a creature's spirit, dealing 16d6 spirit damage with a basic Fortitude save.

spells.name: Spirit Link
spells.effectSummary: You form a spiritual link with another creature, taking in its pain.

spells.name: Spirit Object
spells.effectSummary: Using a sliver of Baba Yaga's power, you briefly bring a nearby object to life.

spells.name: Spirit of the Beast
spells.effectSummary: You bring out the spirit of another animal that lives within your companion.

spells.name: Spirit Sense
spells.effectSummary: You open your mind to the metaphysical, enabling you to sense nearby spirits.

spells.name: Spirit Song
spells.effectSummary: Your eldritch song sends pulsing waves of ethereal energy to attack creatures' spirits in the area, dealing 14d6 spirit damage that causes their bodies to momentarily freeze up from the hypnotic na...

spells.name: Spirit Veil
spells.effectSummary: You draw an occluding veil of spirits around yourself, blocking yourself especially well from undead eyes.

spells.name: Spirit Ward
spells.effectSummary: You draw on nearby spiritual energy or on echoes of the spirits you've invoked throughout your life to temporarily ward living flesh against dangerous spirits.

spells.name: Spiritual Anamnesis
spells.effectSummary: Memories of a past life that seem incredibly real (and may even be) overwhelm the target's mind.

spells.name: Spiritual Armament
spells.effectSummary: You create a ghostly, magical echo of one weapon you're wielding or wearing and fling it.

spells.name: Spiritual Attunement
spells.effectSummary: You attune yourself to a spiritual plane of the Outer Sphere, connecting your spirit without fully transporting to it.

spells.name: Spiritual Epidemic
spells.effectSummary: You curse the target, sapping its spirit and leaving a contagious trap in its essence.

spells.name: Spiritual Guardian
spells.effectSummary: A Medium guardian made of magical force appears in an unoccupied space in range.

spells.name: Spiritual Renewal
spells.effectSummary: You draw upon the restorative power of the spirits around you.

spells.name: Spiritual Torrent
spells.effectSummary: You release your spiritual essence in a torrential blast of energy, dealing 10d6 damage.

spells.name: Spiritual Transport
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the spiritual energies surrounding you to teleport you to an unoccupied space within range that you can see.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.effectSummary: A weapon made of pure magical force materializes and attacks foes you designate within range.

spells.name: Splinter Volley
spells.effectSummary: You launch a volley of splinters at your foes.

spells.name: Split Shadow
spells.effectSummary: You create a shadow double of the target by drawing energy directly from the Shadow Plane into a mirror and shaping it into an exact, quasi-real duplicate.

spells.name: Split the Tongue
spells.targets: A creature within 30 feet fails a Deception or Diplomacy check.
spells.effectSummary: The deceiving creature's tongue splits like a serpent's tongue.

spells.name: Spout
spells.effectSummary: Water blasts upward, coming out of the ground, rising from a pool, or even manifesting from thin air.

spells.name: Sprawling Tunnels
spells.effectSummary: You spill the ink on an accurate map of the area, which transforms into a series of lines that correspond to a new network of tunnels under the earth.

spells.name: Spray of Stars
spells.effectSummary: You fling a spray of tiny shooting stars, dealing 2d4 fire damage.

spells.name: Spy's Mark
spells.targets: a wall or other solid, immobile surface
spells.effectSummary: By pressing your hand to a wall or other solid immobile surface, you cause the crossed-swords symbol of the Firebrands—or a different symbol of your choosing—to appear on the targeted surface.

spells.name: Stabilize
spells.effectSummary: Life energy shuts death's door.

spells.name: Stagnate Time
spells.effectSummary: You examine the time stream in a particular area, then proceed to stick a few metaphorical pins into it, thickening and slowing down the flow of time until it rumbles along like a river of molasses.

spells.name: Stasis
spells.targets: 1 creature or up to 1 Bulk of objects
spells.effectSummary: The flow of time congeals around an object or creature, holding it in place.

spells.name: Statuette
spells.targets: 1 freestanding, non-magical object no larger than 3,000 cubic feet (the size of a Huge creature)
spells.effectSummary: This ritual is a variant of the shrink item spell that allows for the transformation of significantly larger items.

spells.name: Status
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: As long as you and the target are on the same plane of existence and both alive, you remain aware of its present state.

spells.name: Steal Shadow
spells.effectSummary: You steal a creature's shadow, leaving it weakened and vulnerable.

spells.name: Steal the Sky
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You make a successful unarmed Strike against a flying creature.

spells.name: Steal Voice
spells.effectSummary: You steal a creature's voice, rendering them mute.

spells.name: Steel Fortifications
spells.effectSummary: You conjure several metal structures that consist of angled beams attached to one another at a central point, which can help block attacks.

spells.name: Sticky Fire
spells.effectSummary: You send a bubble of viscous liquid that sparks into flame.

spells.name: Stifling Stillness
spells.effectSummary: You make all air in the target area unnaturally still and unyielding, creating a shimmering haze.

spells.name: Sting of the Sea
spells.effectSummary: A long tentacle like that belonging to an octopus, anemone, or man-of-war, dripping with briny water, appears from a glowing blue portal to wrap around the target's face, blocking its vision.

spells.name: Stinking Cloud
spells.effectSummary: You create a cloud of putrid mist in the area.

spells.name: Stoke the Heart
spells.effectSummary: Your patron fills a creature with fervor, empowering their blows.

spells.name: Stone Lance
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a jagged lance of stone and then launch it at a foe.

spells.name: Stone to Flesh
spells.targets: petrified creature or human-size stone object
spells.effectSummary: Manipulating the fundamental particles of matter, you convert stone into flesh and blood.

spells.name: Stonesense
spells.effectSummary: You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense to a range of 100 feet, but you can only sense vibrations through natural stone (not masonry, adobe, or any other manufactured edifice).

spells.name: Store Time
spells.effectSummary: You store time for later use.

spells.name: Storm Lord
spells.effectSummary: The sky above you darkens in a matter of moments, swirling with ominous clouds punctuated by flashes of lighting.

spells.name: Storm of Vengeance
spells.effectSummary: A massive storm cloud forms in the air in a 360-foot burst.

spells.name: Stormburst
spells.effectSummary: Your voice projects like cracking thunder as you summon a localized storm, creating a fearsome surge of lightning and wind that deals 6d6 electricity damage.

spells.name: Stormwind Flight
spells.effectSummary: Powerful winds carry you smoothly through the air, giving you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Strange Geometry
spells.effectSummary: Area 4 cubes, each 10 feet on a side

spells.name: Strength of Mind
spells.effectSummary: You bolster your ally with reminders of their physical prowess, granting them additional defenses against harmful mental effects.

spells.name: String of Fate
spells.effectSummary: You bond yourself to a cherished friend, vowing to share their fate for good or for ill.

spells.name: Stumbling Curse
spells.effectSummary: With a twist of a finger, you send a creature careening on a haphazard trajectory.

spells.name: Stupefy
spells.effectSummary: You dull the target's mind, depending on its Will save.

spells.name: Subconscious Suggestion
spells.effectSummary: You implant a subconscious suggestion deep within the target's mind for them to follow when a trigger you specify occurs.

spells.name: Subjugate Undead
spells.targets: one undead creature with a level of no more than your level -4
spells.effectSummary: You attempt to seize control of the target.

spells.name: Sudden Blight
spells.effectSummary: You accelerate the processes of decay in the area.

spells.name: Sudden Bolt
spells.effectSummary: You call down a small bolt of lightning on the target, dealing 4d12 electricity damage.

spells.name: Sudden Recollection
spells.effectSummary: You place a bit of knowledge deep in a creature's subconscious or make a willing creature forget some information until a specific trigger occurs.

spells.name: Sudden Shift
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An enemy misses you with a melee attack.

spells.name: Sudden Transposition
spells.effectSummary: You wrench the targets off their feet, forcefully teleporting them within the area.

spells.name: Suffocate
spells.targets: 1 living creature that needs to breathe
spells.effectSummary: You forcefully and cruelly draw the living breath from a creature's lungs, dealing 4d8 bludgeoning damage.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.effectSummary: Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist.

spells.name: Summerland Spell
spells.effectSummary: The Summerland Spell is an extension of a unique ritual developed by Brogan the Grasswalker.

spells.name: Summon Anarch
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a chaotic celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

spells.name: Summon Ancient Fleshforged
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You summon an ancient Fleshforged, one of Nex's personal weaponized monstrosities unleashed in the first wars against Geb.

spells.name: Summon Animal
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the animal trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Archmage
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You briefly call forth the spirit of a legendary wizard from ages long past, which manifests as an immense humanoid figure (typically an elf or a human).

spells.name: Summon Axiom
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a lawful celestial, monitor, or fiend to fight on your behalf.

spells.name: Summon Celestial
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the celestial trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Construct
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the construct trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Deific Herald
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Your faith is strong enough to briefly summon a direct representative of your deity, such as the deity's herald.

spells.name: Summon Draconic Legion
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You momentarily summon an army of powerful dragons that unleash annihilating blasts as they descend upon your location.

spells.name: Summon Dragon
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the dragon trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Elemental
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the elemental trait and whose level is 1 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Elemental Herald
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Your meditation into the different elemental planes connects you to them deeply, and this connection allows you to summon a herald of an elemental lord.

spells.name: Summon Entity
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the aberration trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Fey
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the fey trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Fiend
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the fiend trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Giant
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the giant trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Healing Servitor
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a servitor forged from raw vitality energy to heal and bolster your allies.

spells.name: Summon Instrument
spells.effectSummary: You materialize a Musical Instrument (Handheld) in your grasp.

spells.name: Summon Irii
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You cast your spell, whisper your words of power, and find that an irii is already here—indeed, they've always been here, and always were, and always will be.

spells.name: Summon Kaiju
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You briefly conjure a kaiju, a massive, rampaging monster with a unique name and legendary reputation.

spells.name: Summon Lesser Servitor
spells.effectSummary: While deities jealously guard their most powerful servants from the summoning spells of those who aren't steeped in the faith, this spell allows you to conjure an inhabitant of the Outer Sphere wit...

spells.name: Summon Monitor
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the monitor trait and whose level is 5 or lower to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Oliphaunt of Jandelay
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You briefly summon the mythical Oliphaunt of Jandelay, unleashing a manifestation of pure destruction that obliterates everything unfortunate enough to stand in its path.

spells.name: Summon Plant or Fungus
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the plant or fungus trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Stampede
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You summon an unstoppable stampede of panicking beasts.

spells.name: Summon Undead
spells.effectSummary: You summon a creature that has the undead trait and whose level is -1 to fight for you.

spells.name: Summon Warden of the Wild
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You briefly call forth the spirit of one of the Wardens of the Wild, the legendary guardians of nature.

spells.name: Summoner's Precaution
spells.effectSummary: You create a buffer in the link between yourself and your eidolon in order to prevent you from falling alongside your bonded ally.

spells.name: Summoner's Visage
spells.effectSummary: You transform your eidolon into your identical twin.

spells.name: Sun Blade
spells.effectSummary: You fire a ray of burning sunlight from your weapon.

spells.name: Sunburst
spells.effectSummary: A powerful globe of searing sunlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 fire damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional (@item.level+1)d10 vitality damage to undead creatures.

spells.name: Sun's Fury
spells.targets: 1 weapon without an unholy rune that is unattended or wielded by you or a willing ally
spells.effectSummary: The target weapon becomes wreathed in a glowing flame.

spells.name: Supreme Connection
spells.effectSummary: In a show of power, you call forth a powerful entity in front of a crowd of onlookers, forcing the entity to manifest and answer your questions.

spells.name: Sure Footing
spells.effectSummary: You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility.

spells.name: Sure Strike
spells.duration: until the end of your turn
spells.effectSummary: The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result.

spells.name: Suspended Retribution
spells.effectSummary: All life dances one step from the precipice, one heartbeat from disaster.

spells.name: Swallow Light
spells.effectSummary: You draw magical light into your open mouth, consuming it and turning its essence into fuel for a gout of life-draining shadows.

spells.name: Swamp of Sloth
spells.effectSummary: Ground in the area turns swampy and fetid.

spells.name: Swampcall
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the spirits of the soil to twist and churn, transforming the terrain in the targeted area into a sodden mess.

spells.name: Swarm Form
spells.effectSummary: You discorporate into a swarm of Tiny creatures.

spells.name: Swarming Wasp Stings
spells.effectSummary: You manifest a swarm of disembodied wasp stingers that stab creatures in the area, possibly poisoning them.

spells.name: Swarmsense
spells.effectSummary: You extend your senses through a multitude of crawling and flying creatures.

spells.name: Swear Oath
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You loudly and firmly state a course of action that you swear to fulfill.

spells.name: Sweet Dream
spells.effectSummary: With your soothing words, you lull the target into an enchanting dream.

spells.name: Sweetest Solstice
spells.targets: a settlement with a level equal to or lower than twice the ritual's level
spells.effectSummary: On long winter nights, many families in Tian Xia share a dish of glutinous rice balls.

spells.name: Symphony of the Unfettered Heart
spells.effectSummary: Your symphony lifts listeners from their worldly concerns.

spells.name: Synaptic Pulse
spells.effectSummary: You emit a pulsating mental blast that penetrates the minds of all enemies in the area.

spells.name: Synchronize
spells.effectSummary: You harmlessly place your unique magic sigil, which is about 1 square inch in size, on your targets.

spells.name: Synchronize Steps
spells.effectSummary: You link the minds of two targets, enabling them to move in tandem.

spells.name: Synesthesia
spells.effectSummary: The target's senses are suddenly rewired in unexpected ways, causing them to process noises as bursts of color, smells as sounds, and so on.

spells.name: Tailwind
spells.effectSummary: The wind at your back pushes you to find new horizons.

spells.name: Take its Course
spells.effectSummary: When someone has overindulged, you can hasten them past the worst of their affliction or intensify their misery.

spells.name: Take Root
spells.effectSummary: Roots sprout from the flesh of the target and coil across the floor or around objects, reinforcing their stance or grip.

spells.name: Take Your Places
spells.effectSummary: The scene would play out exactly as you envisioned it, if only the actors would respect their blocking.

spells.name: Talking Corpse
spells.effectSummary: You grant the target corpse a semblance of life, which it uses to speak the answers to three questions posed to it.

spells.name: Tame
spells.effectSummary: As you make comforting sounds and gestures, you approach the target in a friendly manner combining caution and confidence.

spells.name: Tangle Vine
spells.effectSummary: A vine appears from thin air, flicking from your hand and lashing itself to the target.

spells.name: Tanglecurse
spells.effectSummary: Tanglebriar has been called a "curse on the land," which has inspired Treerazer's cult to develop this notorious spell.

spells.name: Tangling Creepers
spells.effectSummary: Dense, twitching creepers sprout from every surface and fill any bodies of water in the area.

spells.name: Tattoo Whispers
spells.effectSummary: You carefully tattoo the same design upon each secondary caster.

spells.name: Teeth to Terror
spells.effectSummary: The target believes its teeth are falling out, crawling along its face, stabbing into its body, and cramming themselves down its throat.

spells.name: Telekinetic Bombardment
spells.effectSummary: You grasp a piece of the landscape—such as a tree, carriage, or piece of masonry—and lob it in your foe's direction.

spells.name: Telekinetic Hand
spells.targets: 1 unattended object of light Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction.

spells.name: Telekinetic Haul
spells.targets: 1 unattended object of up to 80 Bulk with no dimension longer than 20 feet
spells.effectSummary: You move the target up to 20 feet, potentially suspending it in midair.

spells.name: Telekinetic Maneuver
spells.effectSummary: With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry.

spells.name: Telekinetic Projectile
spells.effectSummary: You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target.

spells.name: Telekinetic Rend
spells.effectSummary: Your mind creates a violent axis of motion in a nearby space that can smash or sever at your will.

spells.name: Telepathic Bond
spells.targets: you and up to 4 willing creatures touched
spells.effectSummary: The targets can communicate telepathically with any or all of the other targets from any point on the same planet.

spells.name: Telepathic Demand
spells.effectSummary: You send the target a message of 25 words or fewer, and it can respond immediately with its own message of 25 words or fewer.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.effectSummary: You can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.targets: you and up to 4 targets touched, either willing creatures or objects roughly the size of a creature.
spells.effectSummary: You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its app...

spells.name: Teleportation Circle
spells.effectSummary: You create a 10-foot-diameter circle on the ground, which acts as a portal to a destination determined at the time of the ritual.

spells.name: Tempest Cloak
spells.effectSummary: You shroud one creature in a cloak of fierce, howling winds, shielding it from attacks and making it difficult to approach.

spells.name: Tempest Form
spells.effectSummary: Your body becomes fluid to better suit your surroundings.

spells.name: Tempest of Shades
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You channel the forces of undeath to briefly call forth an amalgam of the vengeful dead slain by your enemies and allies alike.

spells.name: Tempest Surge
spells.effectSummary: You surround a foe in a swirling storm of violent winds, roiling clouds, and crackling lightning.

spells.name: Tempest Touch
spells.effectSummary: Your touch calls forth a churning mass of icy water that clings to your target, dealing 1d4 bludgeoning damage and 1d4 cold damage.

spells.name: Temporal Distortion
spells.effectSummary: You share some of your own temporal distortions with a foe, altering their mind and body unpredictably as they're thrown backward or forward in time.

spells.name: Temporal Twin
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You pull a fleeting duplicate of your ally from the recent past.

spells.name: Temporal Ward
spells.effectSummary: You ward a target doorway or container with a temporal trap that rewinds the personal timeline of creatures trying to open it.

spells.name: Temporary Glyph
spells.effectSummary: Area 5-foot square

spells.name: Temporary Tool
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a temporary simple tool, such as a shovel or rope into your hands.

spells.name: Tempt Fate
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You or an ally within range attempts a saving throw.

spells.name: Tentacular Limbs
spells.effectSummary: Your arms turn into long, pliable tentacles, increasing your reach when you're delivering touch range spells and making unarmed Strikes with your arms (such as fist and claw Strikes) to 10 feet.

spells.name: Terminate Bloodline
spells.targets: 1 creature of a level no greater than double the terminate bloodline ritual's level
spells.effectSummary: Mighty drow noble houses, including House Shraen, use this ritual to stamp out fledgling noble houses before they rise to power.

spells.name: Terrain Transposition
spells.effectSummary: You mystically transpose your current location with another.

spells.name: Tesseract Tunnel
spells.effectSummary: You race from point to point, tearing open a tunnel in space.

spells.name: Tether
spells.effectSummary: You use magical chains, vines, or other tethers to bind your target to you.

spells.name: The Four Hunters
spells.effectSummary: This is a story of four evenly matched hunters who sought to capture a falling star.

spells.name: The Parrot's Whisper
spells.effectSummary: You call forth an echo of the gossiping parrot from the tale of the Witch and the Weaver to whisper the secrets of a creature you can see within range.

spells.name: The Queen's Rainbow
spells.effectSummary: You tell the story of the Queen of Bees and her retinue trying to pass through a rainbow on their way to visit the King of Spiders.

spells.name: The Unseeing Blade Master
spells.effectSummary: There are many legends of blade masters who, not wanting to rely on flawed mortal eyes, learned to fight through reliance on both their other keen senses and knowledge from the universe itself.

spells.name: The World's a Stage
spells.effectSummary: This famous ritual is a sophisticated example of symbolic magic, binding fate and fortune to follow a prepared script.

spells.name: Thermal Remedy
spells.targets: up to 1 gallon of non-magical liquid or up to 5 pounds of food
spells.effectSummary: You adjust the delicate levels of bitter ingredients in food and drink to draw out their full restorative and fortifying properties.

spells.name: Thermal Stasis
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: The same abilities that let you raise or lower thermal energy also let you keep it at a safe medium.

spells.name: Thicket of Knives
spells.effectSummary: You create numerous phantom copies of your weapon arm, hiding your true movements and rendering your attacks unpredictable.

spells.name: Thief of Fortune
spells.targets: one beneficial spell effect currently affecting a creature, with a duration of 10 minutes or less
spells.effectSummary: Seeing another creature improve themself with magic, you reach out and seize its benefits for yourself.

spells.name: Thoughtful Gift
spells.effectSummary: You teleport one object of light or negligible Bulk held in your hand to the target.

spells.name: Threatening Mimicry
spells.effectSummary: You appear larger and stronger to nearby creatures, appearing to possess threatening features like antlers, claws, or poison to their senses.

spells.name: Threefold Aspect
spells.duration: until the next time you make your daily preparations
spells.effectSummary: This spell allows you to change between three versions of yourself of different ages: a maiden (young adult), a mother (adult), or a matriarch (elderly).

spells.name: Threefold Limb
spells.effectSummary: You temporarily transform one of your limbs into water, taking the form of ice, liquid water, or steam as you desire.

spells.name: Thunderburst
spells.effectSummary: You create a powerful blast of air and a loud peal of thunder, dealing 2d6 bludgeoning damage and 2d6 sonic damage.

spells.name: Thundering Dominance
spells.effectSummary: You shroud the target in a powerful predatory aura and amplify its vocalizations.

spells.name: Thunderous Strike
spells.effectSummary: You swing your massive weapon, creating a wave of sonic vibrations that topples creatures.

spells.name: Thunderstrike
spells.effectSummary: You call down a tendril of lightning that cracks with thunder, dealing 1d12 electricity damage and 1d4 sonic damage to the target with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Tidal Surge
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a tremendous wave to move the target either in a body of water or on the ground.

spells.name: Timber
spells.effectSummary: You create a small dead tree in your space that falls over on anyone in its path, then immediately decomposes.

spells.name: Time Beacon
spells.duration: until the end of your turn
spells.effectSummary: You create a beacon in time to return to it if things go wrong.

spells.name: Time Jump
spells.effectSummary: You leap forward a few seconds in time, appearing across the battlefield in the blink of an eye.

spells.name: Time Pocket
spells.targets: one item of 1 Bulk or less that a willing creature is holding
spells.effectSummary: You fling the target item forward in time and link it to the future of the creature holding it.

spells.name: Time Sense
spells.effectSummary: When you Cast the Spell, you gain a perfect sense of time.

spells.name: Time Skip
spells.effectSummary: You manipulate time around your ally, pushing them forward a few moments in time.

spells.name: Timely Tutor
spells.effectSummary: You serve as an astral connection between your eidolon or familiar and the Akashic Record-a demiplane consisting of a comprehensive psychic library-then turn to the creature for advice.

spells.name: Tireless Worker
spells.effectSummary: You suppress your choice of one of the following conditions that's affecting the target: Clumsy, Encumbered, Enfeebled, or Fatigued.

spells.name: Tomorrow's Dawn
spells.effectSummary: The golden light of a new dawn and the promise of life beyond death radiates from your body.

spells.name: Tortoise and the Hare
spells.targets: 1 foe, and either yourself or 1 ally
spells.effectSummary: You prove that slow and steady doesn't always win the race by turning a foe into a proverbial tortoise and yourself or an ally into a hare, siphoning some of the foe's speed and granting it to the ...

spells.name: Torturous Trauma
spells.effectSummary: With this spell born of Kemnebi's sadistic love of torture, you batter a creature's internal organs, leaving no external signs of the immense pain you delivered.

spells.name: Touch of Death
spells.effectSummary: Make a melee unarmed Strike.

spells.name: Touch of Obedience
spells.effectSummary: Your imperious touch erodes the target's willpower, making it easier to control.

spells.name: Touch of the Moon
spells.effectSummary: When you touch the target, a symbol of the moon appears on its forehead, glowing with soft moonlight.

spells.name: Touch of the Void
spells.targets: 1 willing undead creature or 1 living creature
spells.effectSummary: You infuse the target with void energy, healing undead or damaging a living creature.

spells.name: Touch of Undeath
spells.effectSummary: You attack the target's life force with undeath, dealing 1d6 void damage.

spells.name: Toxic Cloud
spells.effectSummary: You conjure a poisonous fog.

spells.name: Trade Death for Life
spells.effectSummary: Your patron steals life from one of your enemies to grant it to another.

spells.name: Trade Items
spells.targets: 1 item you're holding and 1 item in another creature's possession you can see, each no more than light Bulk
spells.effectSummary: You magically swap an item you're holding for another that someone else has.

spells.name: Transcribe Conflict
spells.effectSummary: You cause a sheet of paper to appear in your hand, and a moment later a detailed description of a combat you experienced within the last hour is recorded on that sheet of paper in a language that y...

spells.name: Transcribe Moment
spells.effectSummary: You instantly create a small, permanent scroll that contains a magically precise written description of your current surroundings in every direction.

spells.name: Translate
spells.effectSummary: The target can understand the meaning of a single language it is hearing or reading when you cast the spell.

spells.name: Translocate
spells.effectSummary: You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to an unoccupied space within range you can see.

spells.name: Transmute Rock And Mud
spells.effectSummary: Area 2 adjacent 10-foot cubes

spells.name: Travel by Turtle
spells.effectSummary: You conjure an intelligent sea turtle, who agrees to carry you upon its shell on a water journey.

spells.name: Traveler's Transit
spells.effectSummary: You add power to your muscles, allowing you to swim or climb walls with ease.

spells.name: Traveling Workshop
spells.effectSummary: Your apparition guides you through complex procedures while using your magic to provide you with whatever tools you need.

spells.name: Tree of Seasons
spells.effectSummary: You cause a Small tree to instantly sprout in an unoccupied space on the ground.

spells.name: Tremor Signs
spells.effectSummary: You send a series of tremors, no longer than a short sentence of speech, toward your target.

spells.name: Tremorsense
spells.effectSummary: You become aware of vibrations in the ground around you.

spells.name: Trickster's Feathers
spells.effectSummary: You conjure four magic feathers, each with the potential to hold a single illusory guise.

spells.name: Trickster's Mirrors
spells.effectSummary: You are surrounded by up to 3 mirrors that reflect twisted and distorted images of you, making it hard to tell where you actually are within your space and potentially causing those who attack you ...

spells.name: Trickster's Twin
spells.effectSummary: You rarely settle for being in just one place.

spells.name: Trim the Blight
spells.effectSummary: You create a cone of shimmering energy that attempts to banish the influence of invasive, supernatural blight, such as that found in Tanglebriar.

spells.name: Triple Time
spells.effectSummary: Your music sets a fast pace.

spells.name: True Target
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You delve into the possible futures of the next few seconds to understand all the ways your foe might avoid harm, then cast out a vision of that future to those around you.

spells.name: Truesight
spells.effectSummary: You see things within 60 feet as they actually are.

spells.name: Truespeech
spells.effectSummary: The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures.

spells.name: Turbulent Tide
spells.effectSummary: You cause the sheath of water and the improvised weapon it surrounds to surge outward with stupendous force as you attack.

spells.name: Ulcerous Canker
spells.effectSummary: Weeping sores open on the target as you expose it to decay, dealing 1d4 void damage and 1d4 poison damage plus (2*ceil(@item.rank/2)-1) bleed damage.

spells.name: Umbral Extraction
spells.effectSummary: You prepare to steal spells from your foes, ripping them from the foe's shadow to stow them in an ephemeral pocket in the Shadow Plane.

spells.name: Umbral Graft
spells.effectSummary: You reflect a spell into a shadowy version of itself, in the process depleting the power of the initial spell.

spells.name: Umbral Journey
spells.targets: you and up to 10 willing creatures touched
spells.effectSummary: You move partially into the Netherworld, using its warped nature to speed your travels.

spells.name: Umbral Mindtheft
spells.effectSummary: You prepare to steal a broad field of knowledge from another creature, siphoning it from their mind and storing it in a pocket of the Shadow Plane connected to your own mind.

spells.name: Unbearable Cacophony
spells.effectSummary: You amplify the sound of every item and creature to impossible levels.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Aura
spells.effectSummary: You focus your sight inside and call on your inner fire to grant you warmth, steady your vision, and soothe your body.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Emblem
spells.effectSummary: Trigger Your last action was a successful Strike against an enemy

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Ignition
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A foe reduces you to half your Hit Points or fewer.

spells.name: Unblinking Flame Revelation
spells.effectSummary: You light your foe with revealing flame.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Advance
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a mighty wave from your hand that buffets back your foes.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Barrier
spells.effectSummary: You create a protective circle around yourself that repels your foes.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Containment
spells.effectSummary: You wrap enemies in four strands of water.

spells.name: Unbreaking Wave Vapor
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You're targeted by an attack made by an attacker you can see.

spells.name: Unbroken Panoply
spells.targets: 1 broken weapon that is unattended or held by a willing creature
spells.effectSummary: As tools of violence undone by violence, broken weapons contain potent symbolic magic that faydhaans often call upon when forming alliances.

spells.name: Uncontrollable Dance
spells.effectSummary: The target is overcome with an all-consuming urge to dance.

spells.name: Undeath's Blessing
spells.effectSummary: You instill within a creature the touch of the grave.

spells.name: Undermine Reality
spells.effectSummary: You lash a target with tendrils of shadow that steal some of its substance, making it quasi-real.

spells.name: Undertaker
spells.effectSummary: You point your finger toward the target and whisper an epitaph that promises to grace their gravestone in the near future.

spells.name: Unexpected Transposition
spells.targets: 1 creature other than the triggering enemy
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You are targeted with an enemy's Strike.

spells.name: Unexpected Windfall
spells.effectSummary: Coins, trinkets carved from heavy stone, and other cumbersome treasures rain down upon a foe.

spells.name: Unfathomable Song
spells.effectSummary: Fleeting notes of a strange and unnatural song fill the air, overtaking the mind.

spells.name: Unfetter Eidolon
spells.effectSummary: You loosen the link between yourself and your eidolon, allowing it to travel farther from you for a short period of time.

spells.name: Unfettered Mark
spells.duration: 24 hours until the magic fades; the tattoo is permanent
spells.effectSummary: You tattoo the target with rare inks and create a magical tattoo called an unfettered mark.

spells.name: Unfettered Movement
spells.effectSummary: You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement.

spells.name: Unfettered Pack
spells.effectSummary: You free those who travel alongside you from environmental hindrances.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Blitz
spells.effectSummary: You blitz forward so quickly that you soar through the air, and nothing can react to you.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Buffet
spells.effectSummary: You surround your unarmed attacks with the speed and force of air.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Crash
spells.effectSummary: You jump up to 120 feet in any direction and then deal 18d6 bludgeoning damage to creatures within a 20‐foot emanation after you land, with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Unfolding Wind Rush
spells.effectSummary: You travel on a rushing wind.

spells.name: Unholy Army
spells.duration: until the end of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: Reaching out to the legions of the wicked, you call upon them for assistance.

spells.name: Unimpeded Stride
spells.effectSummary: Divine grace ensure that nothing can keep you prisoner or hold you back.

spells.name: Unity
spells.targets: each ally targeted by the triggering spell
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You and 1 or more allies within range are targeted by a spell or ability that allows a saving throw.

spells.name: Unravel Knowledge
spells.effectSummary: Your patron reaches into the target's mind, plucking out their past training like pulling a thread from a cloth.

spells.name: Unraveling Blast
spells.effectSummary: You unleash a small blast of potential that destroys one of a creature's possible futures, leaving them reeling.

spells.name: Unrelenting Observation
spells.targets: 1 creature or object tracked and up to 5 other willing creatures
spells.effectSummary: This spell grants perfect sight based on scrying, allowing several willing targets to track the exact movements or position of one creature or object.

spells.name: Unseasonable Squall
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You issue a blast of sudden wind that ripples outward from the center of the burst.

spells.name: Unseen Heralds
spells.effectSummary: Although this spell has spread throughout the Inner Sea, it likely came first from Nex, where it is used to raise alarms or notify the populace of new policies.

spells.name: Unsettling Knowledge
spells.effectSummary: You share a piece of hidden knowledge with a creature that is both upsetting and intriguing.

spells.name: Unspeakable Shadow
spells.effectSummary: You alter a creature's shadow, transforming it into a terrifying monster out to devour the creature.

spells.name: Untamed Form
spells.effectSummary: You reach within for a different part of yourself, and you set it free, transforming your body into another form.

spells.name: Untamed Shift
spells.effectSummary: You transform just a part of your body.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Augmentation
spells.effectSummary: Your unarmed attacks are treated as cold iron and silver, they gain the earth trait, and they gain a +1 status bonus to damage rolls per damage die.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Buffer
spells.effectSummary: You send currents of protective ki to the surface of your body that protect you from harm, at least until your enemies dissipate them.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Pillar
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the earth and your ki to shield you from your enemies.

spells.name: Untwisting Iron Roots
spells.effectSummary: You manipulate the earth beneath your feet to throw your enemies off balance, leaving chunks of rock and rubble behind.

spells.name: Unusual Anatomy
spells.effectSummary: You transform your flesh and organs into a bizarre amalgam of glistening skin, rough scales, tufts of hair, and tumorous protuberances.

spells.name: Updraft
spells.effectSummary: A powerful blast of wind erupts from the ground, launching the target into the air and sending it crashing back down.

spells.name: Upheaval
spells.effectSummary: The ground in the area shudders and crumbles as huge pillars of stone erupt into the air, rending the terrain around them.

spells.name: Uplifting Overture
spells.effectSummary: Your performance makes allies feel they can succeed at anything.

spells.name: Utter Destruction
spells.effectSummary: You screech with an unearthly voice made of destructive energy, smashing everything that lies before you.

spells.name: Vacuum
spells.effectSummary: You inhale all air in the surrounding area, stealing the breath of nearby creatures.

spells.name: Valiant Anthem
spells.effectSummary: You chant a rallying cry to bolster your allies.

spells.name: Vampiric Exsanguination
spells.effectSummary: You draw in the blood and life force of other creatures through your outstretched arms.

spells.name: Vampiric Feast
spells.effectSummary: Your touch leeches the lifeblood out of a target to empower yourself.

spells.name: Vampiric Maiden
spells.effectSummary: A ghostly iron maiden snaps shut on the target and drains its vitality for your gain.

spells.name: Vanishing Tracks
spells.effectSummary: You obscure the tracks you leave behind.

spells.name: Vapor Form
spells.effectSummary: The target transforms into a vaporous state.

spells.name: Variable Gravity
spells.effectSummary: You can adjust how strongly gravity grips you, changing between low gravity, normal gravity, and high gravity with ease.

spells.name: Vector Screen
spells.duration: until the start of your next turn
spells.effectSummary: You set up a transparent, rippling screen of telekinetic energy that seizes small, fast-moving projectiles.

spells.name: Veil of Confidence
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a veil of confidence.

spells.name: Veil of Dreams
spells.effectSummary: Your patron draws the target into a drowsy state, causing daydreams and sluggishness.

spells.name: Veil of Privacy
spells.effectSummary: You erect protective wards that make the target difficult to detect via magic.

spells.name: Veil of Spirits
spells.effectSummary: You draw on the essence of spiritual energy surrounding you to manifest a misty veil.

spells.name: Vengeful Glare
spells.effectSummary: Your gaze falls on a creature, filled with icy vengeance or fiery wrath.

spells.name: Ventriloquism
spells.effectSummary: Whenever you speak or make any other sound vocally, you can make your vocalization seem to originate from somewhere else within 60 feet, and you can change that apparent location freely as you voca...

spells.name: Verdant Sprout
spells.effectSummary: You imbue a single ordinary, inexpensive plant seed with primal energy and throw it onto a surface, where it gradually sprouts into a Medium plant.

spells.name: Verminous Lure
spells.effectSummary: Upon casting, the target emits a musk that's captivating to certain animals.

spells.name: Vibrant Pattern
spells.effectSummary: You create a pattern of lights that pulses with intensity.

spells.name: Vibrant Thorns
spells.effectSummary: Your body sprouts a coat of brambly thorns that thrive on life magic.

spells.name: Vibrant Vibrato
spells.effectSummary: Your voice trills in perfect vibrato.

spells.name: Vicious Howl
spells.effectSummary: You howl with passion for your cause, empowering yourself to push beyond your limits.

spells.name: Vicious Jealousy
spells.effectSummary: The target is overcome by deep jealousy and resentment that twists its mind against other creatures.

spells.name: Victory Cry
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An ally within range critically succeeds at a melee Strike.

spells.name: Vindicator's Judgment
spells.effectSummary: You pronounce a terrible judgment upon your quarry that causes all of your attacks and divine spells to strike with deadly efficacy.

spells.name: Vindicator's Mark
spells.effectSummary: You launch a magical dart at your hunted prey, which marks them with a nimbus only you can detect.

spells.name: Vision of Beauty
spells.effectSummary: You create a phantasmal image of the most beautiful creature imaginable to the target at a location somewhere within the spell's range.

spells.name: Vision of Death
spells.effectSummary: You force the target to see a vision of its own death.

spells.name: Vision of Weakness
spells.effectSummary: You focus your gaze on a creature and gain a flash of divine insight into its nature.

spells.name: Visions of Danger
spells.effectSummary: An illusion of horrific creatures fills the spell's area.

spells.name: Vital Beacon
spells.effectSummary: Vitality radiates outward from you, allowing others to supplicate and receive healing.

spells.name: Vital Luminance
spells.effectSummary: Drawing life force into yourself, you become a beacon of vitality.

spells.name: Vital Singularity
spells.effectSummary: When several companions or followers have reached a point of undying love and trust in you, they might be willing to die to save your life.

spells.name: Vitality Lash
spells.targets: 1 creature that is undead or otherwise has void healing
spells.effectSummary: You demolish the target's corrupted essence with energy from Creation's Forge.

spells.name: Vitrifying Blast
spells.effectSummary: You launch a cone of glass shards, which embed in creatures to turn them partially to glass.

spells.name: Voice on the Breeze
spells.effectSummary: You whisper a secret message or sound into the wind, which carries it to a designated spot.

spells.name: Void Harvest
spells.effectSummary: The sky darkens over the affected area and the air becomes oppressive as you open a direct conduit to the Void, a plane of vast nothingness.

spells.name: Void Warp
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the Void to harm life force.

spells.name: Volcanic Eruption
spells.effectSummary: Area 5-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Vomit Swarm
spells.effectSummary: You belch forth a swarm of magical vermin.

spells.name: Voracious Gestalt
spells.effectSummary: You create a powerful spirit entity that grows and builds strength by consuming the spirits of foes you both slay.

spells.name: Wails of the Damned
spells.effectSummary: You howl a lament of damned souls.

spells.name: Waking Dream
spells.effectSummary: You cloud the target's mind with vivid, dreamlike imagery, so they have difficulty distinguishing real threats from imagined ones.

spells.name: Waking Nightmare
spells.effectSummary: You fill the creature's mind with a terrifying vision.

spells.name: Wall of Fire
spells.effectSummary: You raise a blazing wall that burns creatures passing through it.

spells.name: Wall of Flesh
spells.effectSummary: You craft a 20-foot-tall wall of living flesh in a straight line up to 30 feet long.

spells.name: Wall of Force
spells.effectSummary: You form an Invisible wall of pure magical force up to 50 feet long and up to 20 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Ice
spells.effectSummary: You sculpt an ice barrier that blocks sight and, once shattered, freezes foes.

spells.name: Wall of Metal
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a sheet of metal, forming a wall of iron, low-grade cold iron, or standard-grade silver up to 60 feet long, 30 feet high, and 1/4 inch thick.

spells.name: Wall Of Mirrors
spells.effectSummary: You create a solid wall of shimmering reflective glass up to 50 feet long and 20 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Radiance
spells.effectSummary: You create a thin wall of brilliant light in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Shadow
spells.effectSummary: You form a wall of pure darkness in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high.

spells.name: Wall of Shrubs
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a line of bushes native to the region to spring from the ground.

spells.name: Wall of Stone
spells.effectSummary: You shape a wall of solid stone.

spells.name: Wall of Thorns
spells.effectSummary: You grow a wall of thorny brambles from the ground.

spells.name: Wall of Virtue
spells.effectSummary: You create a translucent wall of light, which draws power from the celestial realms.

spells.name: Wall of Water
spells.effectSummary: Raising your hand in the air, you call a massive wave onto the battlefield.

spells.name: Wall of Wind
spells.effectSummary: You create a barrier of gusting winds that hinders anything moving through it.

spells.name: Wanderer's Guide
spells.effectSummary: You call upon the beyond to guide your route.

spells.name: Ward Domain
spells.effectSummary: Area 100 feet × 100 feet, up to 50 feet high.

spells.name: Warding Aggression
spells.effectSummary: You channel a magical ward through your attack and attempt to plant it on a foe.

spells.name: Warning Stripes
spells.effectSummary: Your skin becomes painted with vivid stripes or bright aposematic swirls, warning other creatures of its toxic qualities.

spells.name: Warp Mind
spells.effectSummary: You scramble a creature's mental faculties and sensory input.

spells.name: Warp Step
spells.effectSummary: When you walk, the earth warps beneath your feet—your steps extend, distance contracts, and everything is just a little bit closer.

spells.name: Warped Terrain
spells.effectSummary: You create illusory hazards that cover all surfaces in the area (typically the ground).

spells.name: Warping Pull
spells.targets: 1 willing creature that would take damage from the triggering effect
spells.effectSummary: Trigger An effect would deal damage to an ally within range.

spells.name: Warrior's Regret
spells.effectSummary: Regret eats away at the target's mind, punishing it for its violence until it ceases its hostility.

spells.name: Wash Your Luck
spells.effectSummary: Some practitioners argue this spell literally washes your fortunes of all influences, malign or benign, while others claim it simply cleanses your mind of obsessions about luck and destiny.

spells.name: Water Breathing
spells.effectSummary: The targets can breathe underwater.

spells.name: Water Walk
spells.effectSummary: The target can walk on the surface of water and other liquids without falling through.

spells.name: Waterproof
spells.effectSummary: You prevent the target item from taking on water or becoming wet for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Waters of Prediction
spells.effectSummary: You and the secondary casters peer into the still waters of a natural pool or lake to divine your collective future.

spells.name: Wave of Despair
spells.effectSummary: You inflict despair on creatures in the area.

spells.name: Weaken Earth
spells.targets: 1 creature, unattended object, or hazard or structure made of stone or earth
spells.effectSummary: You weaken the bonds that hold earth and stone together.

spells.name: Weapon of Judgment
spells.effectSummary: An immense weapon of spiritual energy appears, hovering in the air above the target.

spells.name: Weapon Storm
spells.effectSummary: Area 30-foot cone or 10-foot emanation

spells.name: Weapon Surge
spells.effectSummary: Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy.

spells.name: Weapon Trance
spells.effectSummary: The serenity of violence fills your mind, giving you a heightened sense of knowing exactly where your weapons need to be.

spells.name: Weaponize Secret
spells.effectSummary: You understand that holding a secret is in itself a kind of power.

spells.name: Weave Wood
spells.targets: 1 piece of unprocessed wood, reeds, or plant fiber of 1 Bulk or less
spells.effectSummary: With a touch, you cause the target to break into fibrous strands that then weave themselves into a woven mundane object of the same Bulk or less, such as a basket, hat, shield, or mat.

spells.name: Web
spells.effectSummary: You create a sticky web in the area that impedes creatures' movement.

spells.name: Web of Eyes
spells.effectSummary: You place an Invisible scrying sensor on each target just above their eyes.

spells.name: Web of Influence
spells.effectSummary: You learn the location of the nearest creature to whom the target is connected in a magical manner.

spells.name: Weird
spells.effectSummary: You fill the targets' minds with terrifying images of fearsome creatures, each drawn from the targets' worst fears.

spells.name: Whirling Flames
spells.effectSummary: You call forth a storm of whirling flames, engulfing all creatures in that area and dealing 5d6 fire damage with a basic Reflex save.

spells.name: Whirling Scarves
spells.effectSummary: You surround yourself in a vortex of whirling colorful scarves of force that obfuscate you and disorient your foes.

spells.name: Whirlpool
spells.effectSummary: Area 25-foot radius, 20-foot tall cylinder

spells.name: Whirlwind
spells.effectSummary: Area (continued) 15-foot radius, 80-foot-tall cylinder

spells.name: Whispering Quiet
spells.effectSummary: You suppress sound in an area, preventing anyone from giving away valuable secrets.

spells.name: Whispers of the Void
spells.effectSummary: You whisper baleful secrets that transcend language and carry magically to the ears of your foes.

spells.name: Wild Allegiance
spells.effectSummary: To many, the animals of Tian Xia are simply beasts to be conquered or harvested, but this isn't how all of the gods intended it.

spells.name: Wild Feast
spells.effectSummary: You draw forth latent hostility in the local flora and fauna.

spells.name: Wild Winds Stance
spells.effectSummary: You take on the stance of the flowing winds, sending out waves of energy at a distance.

spells.name: Wildfire
spells.effectSummary: A thin layer of ash and flame covers the ground in the area.

spells.name: Wilding Word
spells.effectSummary: Your patron's majesty—or their displeasure—comes in a growl from your throat, making other creatures reluctant to harm you.

spells.name: Wind Jump
spells.effectSummary: You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Wind Whispers
spells.effectSummary: You call forth numerous breezes in which you weave gossip, whispering subtly into the ears of those around.

spells.name: Wings of the Valkyrie
spells.effectSummary: Powerful feathered wings—usually vibrant white or jet black—emerge from your back, granting you a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

spells.name: Winning Streak
spells.effectSummary: The target is energized by its good fortune as it spreads to others-as long as they keep winning.

spells.name: Winter Bolt
spells.effectSummary: You fling a hollow icicle filled with winter's wrath.

spells.name: Winter's Breath
spells.effectSummary: The cold and dour months of winter are an excellent time to gather with friends and family to enjoy a pot of hot tea.

spells.name: Wisdom of the Winds
spells.effectSummary: You ask a question of the spirits of air, imploring them to send signals through the winds to help you find your way.

spells.name: Wish
spells.effectSummary: You weave the fabric of reality itself to grant the target's greatest desire.

spells.name: Wish-Twisted Form
spells.effectSummary: You focus your magic upon an enemy, wishing for their defenses to fail and turning their strengths into weaknesses.

spells.name: Withering Grasp
spells.effectSummary: Your touch rots organic material and decays objects.

spells.name: Wood Walk
spells.effectSummary: Wood shapes itself according to your will readily, making staircases appear as you climb up the side of a tree, automatically weaving vines into ladders, or lowering branches to lift you up to the ...

spells.name: Wooden Double
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You're critically hit by a damage-dealing effect or a Strike.

spells.name: Wooden Fists
spells.effectSummary: Your arms and hands swell with new growth, transforming into tree trunks twice as big as their current size.

spells.name: Word of Freedom
spells.effectSummary: You utter a liberating word of power that frees a creature.

spells.name: Word of Revision
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature within range fails or critically fails a saving throw or is reduced to 0 Hit Points

spells.name: Word of Truth
spells.effectSummary: You speak a statement you believe to be true and that is free of any attempt to deceive through twisting words, omission, and so on.

spells.name: Wordsmith
spells.targets: 1 document written by a single author and comprised of written text in a single language
spells.duration: until the next time you Refocus
spells.effectSummary: You're a devotee of knowledge with an unmatched command of the language used to spread that knowledge, and you can reshape the written word into a form more understandable to your audience.

spells.name: World in Shadow
spells.effectSummary: This ritual must be cast at night, at which point darkness becomes everlasting.

spells.name: Worm's Repast
spells.effectSummary: Gnawing worms materialize within the flesh of the target creature, dealing 4d6 piercing damage and floor(@item.level/2)d6 persistent,piercing damage.

spells.name: Wrathful Storm
spells.effectSummary: A massive storm cloud forms in the air above the area, spreading rain and gales.

spells.name: Wronged Monk's Wrath
spells.effectSummary: You unleash your ki as a powerful storm of force and lightning, dealing 2d6 force damage and 2d12 electricity damage to creatures in the area.

spells.name: Wyvern Sting
spells.effectSummary: You duplicate the venomous sting of a wyvern.

spells.name: Ymeri's Mark
spells.effectSummary: You place the fiery mark of the Queen of the Inferno on the target, burning into the creature's very essence.

spells.name: You're Mine
spells.effectSummary: You manipulate the target's emotions, potentially allowing you to control it for a brief instant.

spells.name: Zeal for Battle
spells.effectSummary: Trigger You and at least 1 ally are about to roll initiative.

spells.name: Zealous Conviction
spells.effectSummary: You bypass your targets' rational minds, instilling them with unshakable conviction and zeal.

spells.name: Zenith Star
spells.effectSummary: You call a tiny star to orbit a creature in a sparkling halo before shooting up into the heavens, where it marks the creature's rough location.

spells.name: Zephyr Slip
spells.effectSummary: Trigger A creature enters a space within 5 feet of you.

spells.name: Zero Gravity
spells.effectSummary: Area 20-foot radius, 40-foot-tall cylinder
